faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for placements at NSHM Institute of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: To qualify for placements, students must maintain a minimum attendance of 75 percent, subject to management's final decision. Additionally, they are required to complete the internship outlined in the course module. The Institute's Placement Policy, which will be available on the ERP, will regulate students' placements and training. Candidates must also ensure that they are not in default of fee payments and have no pending or taken disciplinary actions against them.

faqs.question: What is the duration of MPH programme at NSHM Institute of Health Sciences, Kolkata?
faqs.answer: The duration of MPH programme at NSHM Institute of Health Science, Kolkata is two-year. The entire course is divided into four semesters. The candidates applying to this course should have scored at least 50% marks in graduation.

faqs.question: Does NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata provide 100% placement?
faqs.answer: The placement rate for NSHM Institute of Health and Sciences has not been disclosed yet. As per the website, NSHM Institute of Health and Sciences provides 100% placement assistance to all the students who are eligible for placements. In 2024, 98% students secured paid internships from companies like Fortis, AIIMS, FSSAI, Nestle, etc.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Admission of students in NSHM Institute of Health Sciences in Kolkata is usually given on merit and entrance examination. For all the undergraduate programs of B.Pharm admission, the applicants should minimum 10+2 level education with subjects like Physics, Chemistry and Biology and additionally they need to get entry in WBJEE. As for the postgraduate studies like M.Pharm, the candidate is usually expected to produce a valid GPAT score. Though there might be few direct management quota seats but that comes with its terms and conditions.

college_info.intro:
NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata offers several UG and PG level courses in the stream of Medicine and Health Sciences, Nursing, Optometry, etc. The popular programmes at NIHS Kolkata include BSc, BPharma, and MSc, among others. The courses are offered across multiple specialisations in full-time mode.

As per the information available on the website, the highest salary package for 2024 stood at INR 12 LPA. Similarly, the average package was INR 5.73 LPA. In addition to this, 98% of students at the NSHM Institute of Health Sciences were offered paid internships. The top recruiters include Nestle, FSSAI, Desun Hospital, AIIMS, and Titan EYE+, etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata offers a wide range of programmes at the UG and PG levels in the streams of Medicine and Health Sciences, Nursing, Optometry, etc. Admission to the courses is either on the basis of merit in the last qualifying exam or the course-specific entrance exams. The courses at NIHS Kolkata are offered across multiple specialisations. The duration of the courses at NSHM Institute of Health Sciences ranges between 2-3 years. Some of the courses offered at NSHM Institute of Health Sciences include BSc, BPharma, MSc, MPharma, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    Admission criteria to NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata is merit based and is different for all UG and PG programmes. To get into UG programmes, the eligibility criteria is the minimum aggregate in Class 12 or equivalent. However, the eligibility criteria to get into PG programmes is graduation in any discipline (this may vary from course to course), along with entrance exams for a few courses.
faqs.question: Can I get into NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    NSHM Institute of Computing and Analytics Kolkata offers various courses at the UG and PG levels. MSc is one of the flagship courses provided at the institute. The total tuition fee for the course ranges between INR 2.58 L to INR 3.51 L. However, students must note that the total fee charged for the MSc course can include multiple components, such as tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, and more. The seat intake for the NSHM Institute of Computing and Analytics Kolkata MSc course is 90. Interested candidates must appear for the entrance exam, namely ENPAT and a Personal Interview (PI).

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, campus, supportive teacher, and placements are above average.

review_content.Placements: In 2024, 40% of students will be placed in top companies like Cipla and Lupin. In my batch, all get internships in June and July, except those who have backlogs in the exam. Top roles offered by companies are quality control, manufacturing, etc. Top companies are Lupin and Cipla.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is fully Wi-Fi with different library sections. The hostel is provided for girls, not for boys. The canteen college is operated by a personal disability person that is excellent. The ground is small so difficult to play football and cricket but it has tennis courts.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Dietetics and Nutrition - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am very satisfied with the department and faculty. The internships and placements are good.

review_content.Placements: We do internsips are dietitias in hospitals. In the pharmaceutical industry sales, and food companies, also provide community services. They offer internships in various fields like these and also have fellowship internships. We have additional research projects that may help in the future if someone wants to pursue a Ph.D.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good and comfortable. They have projector facilities. Wi-Fi is also available. The library environment is very nice and provides a very positive vibe. A lot of study material can be found there, and you can also make notes while sitting in the library. The whole campus feels happy.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Optometry (B.Optom.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overall satisfied by NSHM.

review_content.Placements: I was in the 2020-2024 batch. In our 4th year, which requires a whole one-year internship, was completely managed by our college placement department. Every student got an internship through the college. Companies like Sushrut, Lenskart, Himalaya, and Zeiss participated in the campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure includes well-equipped labs, comfortable classrooms, and a library with plenty of books (I didn't need to buy any). Wi-Fi is available, and there is a canteen on campus. There are basketball and volleyball grounds for practice, and the campus is well-decorated with plants.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Campus blooms of NSHM Knowledge Campus.

review_content.Placements: For entering this course, you have to qualify for WBJEE or JEE Main with a good number. Many companies, like Glenmark Cipla Sun Pharma, come for internships and placements, but the package is not that lucrative; you have to do a higher degree, and the quality of pharmacy is not that good in the outside world.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has Wi-Fi for everyone and has good library facilities that are good and friendly. On this college campus in Kolkata, you will not get hostel facilities; they only provide mess with high charges and very bad quality food, so you should prefer to stay in PG.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is an average college with good infrastructure, but our college does not provide good placements.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 30% of students are placed. The salary package offered is not good. The highest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Cipla, Lupin, etc., visit our campus. Almost 50% of students get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. Browsing speed is not good. Labs are average. The library is well maintained. Almost all books are available in the library.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful. Senior professors are knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant. Semester exams are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the behavior and atmosphere of our college.

review_content.Placements: Almost every student gets placed at our college. The highest package at our college is INR 8 Lacs per annum, and the average is INR 5 Lacs per annum. Top companies come here for placement, like GSK, Dr. Reddy, Mcloid, Alkane, etc. An internship is earned by every student on merit.
review_content.Infrastructure: Almost every facility is available at our college. And the infrastructure of our college is very attractive. The facilities are very helpful here. They can do everything for you. The teacher-student ratio in our college is 1:4 which is quite good.

admission_process.title: NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata admission process 2026is conducted online. The college accepts entrance exams to select candidates for specific courses. Aspirants need to apply online for admission to the preferred course. Below are the steps to get a seat at NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata:

Candidates fulfilling the eligibility requirements can apply online for NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata admission. As per the information collated from the web, aspirants must pay an application fee to register for a course. Candidates need to fill out the form and upload the specified documents to complete the application process.

NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata shortlists candidates for most of the courses based on the entrance exam accepted by the college. The university considers entrance exams such as MAKAUT CET, GPAT, JEE Main and others for admission to all its courses. Candidates have to appear in the E-NPAT (NSHM Personality & Aptitude Test) followed by PI round.
After candidates get selected, they must complete their admission by payingNSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata feefor selected course within the given deadline to secure a seat.

NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkatacourse fee includes tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Students who get selected have to pay admission fee as the final step for seat confirmation. The below table mentions theNSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata fee structurefor available courses:
Note:This data is taken from official website/ sanctioning body and may vary.

NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkataseat intake varies with course. The seats availability determines admission into different courses at NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata. faqs.question: How successful is the placement cell in securing jobs for B.Pharma students at NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Based on the reviews and feedback from students and alumni on Shiksha, the important information regarding the placement cell at NSHM Institute of Health Sciences, Kolkata are as follows: Placement Record: According to several reviews, around 90% of students from the B.Pharm programme have secured jobs after graduation. Notably, even during the pandemic, the college managed to place 93% of its students. Companies Visiting Campus: Companies like Sun Pharma, Cipla, Cognizant, Wipro, and GlaxoSmithKline (GSK) regularly visit the campus for recruitment purposes. The highest Package: The highest package offered to a B.Pharm graduate from NSHM Institute of Health Sciences was reportedly INR5.2 Lacs per annum. Faculty Support: Students appreciate the guidance and support provided by the faculty members, who are said to be knowledgeable, experienced, and approachable. Placement Cell Efforts: The placement cell is actively involved in preparing students for the job market, offering career counseling, and connecting them with potential employers. While these figures may not be exhaustive, they indicate a relatively strong performance by the placement cell at NSHM Institute of Health Sciences, Kolkata. However, it's essential to note that individual results may vary, and students should research thoroughly before making an informed decision about pursuing higher education.

hostel_campus.college_name: NSHM Institute of Health Sciences Kolkata Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: There are separate boys' and girls' hostels with a games room, common room, dining halls, and gymnasium.
There are separate boys' and girls' hostels with a games room, common room, dining halls, and gymnasium.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, campus, supportive teacher, and placements are above average.
reviews.review_text: The college is fully Wi-Fi with different library sections. The hostel is provided for girls, not for boys. The canteen college is operated by a personal disability person that is excellent. The ground is small so difficult to play football and cricket but it has tennis courts.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the department and faculty. The internships and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good and comfortable. They have projector facilities. Wi-Fi is also available. The library environment is very nice and provides a very positive vibe. A lot of study material can be found there, and you can also make notes while sitting in the library. The whole campus feels happy.

reviews.review_heading: Overall satisfied by NSHM.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure includes well-equipped labs, comfortable classrooms, and a library with plenty of books (I didn't need to buy any). Wi-Fi is available, and there is a canteen on campus. There are basketball and volleyball grounds for practice, and the campus is well-decorated with plants.

reviews.review_heading: Campus blooms of NSHM Knowledge Campus.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi for everyone and has good library facilities that are good and friendly. On this college campus in Kolkata, you will not get hostel facilities; they only provide mess with high charges and very bad quality food, so you should prefer to stay in PG.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with good infrastructure, but our college does not provide good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Browsing speed is not good. Labs are average. The library is well maintained. Almost all books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the behavior and atmosphere of our college.
reviews.review_text: Almost every facility is available at our college. And the infrastructure of our college is very attractive. The facilities are very helpful here. They can do everything for you. The teacher-student ratio in our college is 1:4 which is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: NSHM knowledge campus is highly satisfying.
reviews.review_text:
Yes, the infrastructure is very good on this campus; all the rooms are equipped with Wi-Fi routers.
And all the time you can access the library for books or studying. Classrooms are big enough and airy so that there is no problem at the time of summer.
You can also access the previous year's question paper via the code at the library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and smart classrooms are the attraction of our campus. Practical labs consist of new instruments. Library is full of journals and pharmacopeia books. Hostel facility is good. Cafeteria is another point of attraction. More than 100 food items are served at reasonable prices. Sports court is not available in our college but the medical room is available separately.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of nshm.
reviews.review_text: The food of the canteen is hilarious. People are geeting I'll by having that of food. The price of simple food is rs 150. Which you can't accept that this quality of food at such a high price. No hygiene is maintain at the canteen floors are durty and table same with the chairs.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NSHM Institute of Health Sciences.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in this college. Laboratory is very good. Classrooms are clean. There are 3 libraries in each building. The cafe is small. But it also has a huge cafe outside the campus. There are two buildings, one for management and another for other courses.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college and I recommend joining it.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are excellent. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There are five labs for our course at the college. We get all course materials from the library. The quality of the hostel facilities is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides great placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great with well-equipped laboratories, classrooms, etc. The canteen and hostel facilities are great. The food price is affordable. It also provides a computer laboratory. Library is also available and several books are provided.

reviews.review_heading: I like this college. It has a good campus and a good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: There were clean and hygienic rooms. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was average. The college canteen was huge and clean. Many indoor activities were available in the hostel area. Good transport facilities were available. Hostels are available for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Review about NSHM Knowledge Campus.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms have no Wi-Fi and there is no problem with the labs. Classrooms have no ACs. I do not knowm any hostel but the canteen is very good. Medical facilities are good but there is no sports ground to play.

reviews.review_heading: Thank you NSHM for shaping my Vision.
reviews.review_text: The campus is beautiful, green, and equipped with modern-day technologies. The classrooms have a modern touch. It is big and spacious as well as provided with projectors. The Labs are well organized with all necessary pieces of equipment and materials.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharma. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college is worth for money if we put in full effort.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good enough in this college. The package offered ranges from 6-7 LPA in the last year. Students with high knowledge in the course can get placements very easily. Our senior batch got the package of 8 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel and classrooms are good enough. The infrastructure is well-built. It is very clean and good. It is very spacious enough for several purposes. Classrooms are very well-ventilated and disciplined. Daily cleaning of the rooms is done.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutical Analysis - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with the placements, faculty members, and HOD, sir.

review_content.Placements: There were 80% placements in our batch, with companies like Quintiles, Baxter International, Biocon, Novartis, and Indegene offering packages of up to 7 Lacs. Lecturers and alumni also help in finding jobs. No internship is provided by the college; we need to find one on our own, but alumni are very supportive in this regard.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no campus life; the college has a small area and a very small canteen with limited entries. Basically, the college is like school with many restrictions, including limited leaves each year. Hindi-speaking people are very few. Basic facilities like internet, well-equipped labs with all necessary chemicals, and a library are available. Four girls stay in one room, which includes gym access, cupboards, hot/cold water, and drinking water. The college mess serves only vegetarian food, but the quality and taste are good. Sports facilities are limited.

review_summary.college_name: JSS College of Pharmacy Mysore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutical Analysis - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good college because of good working environment, good infrastructure, and good placement.

content.Placements: I have completed my course in 2023, 2021-2023 batch. In my course, 15 students were there in the P. Analysis branch, of which 08 students got placed. The highest package was offered by Baxter, which was 5.5 LPA and the lowest package offered was 3 LPA by Micro Lab.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good, and they provided sufficient equipment for our research work, like UV, IR, GC, HPLC, DSC, LC-MS, and NMR. All this equipment was sufficient for the research activities in pharmaceutical analysis, and we were free to use it.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College has good infrastructure and good faculties. This is one of the best colleges for pharmacy.

content.Placements: 90% of students get placement. The highest package is 9 LPA and the lowest is 5 LPA. Dr Reddy's, IncepBio Pvt Ltd. This college has good placements with a good amount of salary, and people here enjoy studying in this college as its NIRF ranking is also 6.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure and good lab facilities, which is used by students of every course to build their practical knowledge. The hostel facility and food are average.
content.Faculty: Our college has qualified and well-educated faculty members. They are very helpful and understand their teaching. Our college good quality of teaching. This course is very good and easy to get jobs. The semester exams in college are good, and 95% of students clear exams. Our college provides more practical knowledge than theoretical knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is worth for money if we put in full effort.

content.Placements: Placements are good enough in this college. The package offered ranges from 6-7 LPA in the last year. Students with high knowledge in the course can get placements very easily. Our senior batch got the package of 8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel and classrooms are good enough. The infrastructure is well-built. It is very clean and good. It is very spacious enough for several purposes. Classrooms are very well-ventilated and disciplined. Daily cleaning of the rooms is done.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutical Analysis - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the placements, faculty members, and HOD, sir.

content.Placements: There were 80% placements in our batch, with companies like Quintiles, Baxter International, Biocon, Novartis, and Indegene offering packages of up to 7 Lacs. Lecturers and alumni also help in finding jobs. No internship is provided by the college; we need to find one on our own, but alumni are very supportive in this regard.
content.Infrastructure: There is no campus life; the college has a small area and a very small canteen with limited entries. Basically, the college is like school with many restrictions, including limited leaves each year. Hindi-speaking people are very few. Basic facilities like internet, well-equipped labs with all necessary chemicals, and a library are available. Four girls stay in one room, which includes gym access, cupboards, hot/cold water, and drinking water. The college mess serves only vegetarian food, but the quality and taste are good. Sports facilities are limited.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college of pharmacy in Mysore.

content.Placements: About 50% of students are placed at Biocon, Pfizer, etc. The lowest salary package offered is 4.5 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 18 LPA. It has a training and placement cell for recruitment. Many students got roles in quality assurance, medical writing, etc.
content.Infrastructure: It is a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus with a well-equipped modern laboratory. The food served in the hostel is better. It has good environment, with a herbal garden. The canteen serves food at an affordable price. Our college provides health insurance and free treatment to students in JSS Hospital.

placement_data.title: JSS College of Pharmacy Mysore Placement overview
paragraphs: What's new regarding JSS College of Pharmacy placement 2021? The college recorded a 100% placement rate with a total of 119 students placed during the academic year 2020-21. Some students were placed before the viva and some were placed after the viva. Over 20 companies visited the JSS College of Pharmacy Mysore campus during their 2021 placements. All the departments of the institute recorded a more than 90% placement rate.
The key highlights of JSS College of Pharmacy placement 2021 are tabulated below:
Associate Clinical Data Manager, Pharmacovigilance, Trainee Product Specialist
Pharmacology, Pharmaceutical Quality Assurance, Industrial Pharmacy
Pharmaleaf India Pvt. Ltd., Tenshi Life Sciences Pvt. Ltd., Cronus Specialities Pvt. Ltd.

A fluctuating trend was observed in the number of companies that visited the JSS Mysore campus in the past three years. It first dropped by almost 21% from 2019 to 2020 and then rose by nearly 90% from 2020 to 2021. See the below infographic to know the exact numbers:

The number of students placed before the viva has been fluctuating over the last three years. A similar trend was observed for the number of students placed after the viva. Check the below table to know the JSS College of Pharmacy placement trends from 2019 to 2021:

The placement rate for top departments like Pharmacology, Pharmaceutical Quality Assurance and Industrial Pharmacy have improved over the past three years. The infographic below depicts the placement rate trends for some of the top departments of JSS College of Pharmacy :
The placement rates for the remaining departments recorded over the past three years are mentioned in the table below:

Pharmacology, Pharmaceutical Quality Assurance, and Industrial Pharmacy departments recorded a 100% placements rate during JSS College of Pharmacy placements 2021. The department-wise placement rate for top departments is depicted in the below infographic:
The percentage of students placed in other departments is mentioned in the table below:

A large share of students received job roles in the Manufacturing Industry, followed by Hospital/ Clinical Pharmacy Area sectors. 5% of students also opted for further education. The pie chart below depicts the sector-wise distribution of JSS College of Pharmacy placements in 2021:
Some of the leading companies that participated in 2021 internships or placement processes are listed in the table below:
Covance India Pharmaceutical Services Pvt. Ltd .

rankings.highlight: Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Karnataka In 2025

nirf.description:
JSS College of Pharmacy Mysore has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, JSS College of Pharmacy Mysore fell 1 rank to #7 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.

hostel_campus.college_name: JSS College of Pharmacy Mysore Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Students have exclusive hostels for men and women with spacious, comfortable, well-furnished rooms with all modern amenities, hygienic kitchens, nutritious food, and a 24-hour security system at any/all JSSU colleges. Students wishing to stay in these hostels are advised to apply in the prescribed forms. The campus has a bank and an ATM kiosk, plus a post office and a healthcare clinic. Leisure time spaces such as reading and television lounges are also available.

library.description: The College Library is known as “INFORMATION CENTRE” is located on the first floor of the College building in a clean and quiet atmosphere. The center is well furnished with wooden reading tables with a separate lighting system and comfortable chairs, journal s and new arrival display racks and one charging and discharging counter. The library is computerized by the Library Management Software “Easy-lib” to achieve the accuracy and speed up the transactions. The software supports Barcode Technology. The library has a huge collection of about 11000 books, pharmaceutical journals, encyclopedias, dictionaries, indexes, manuals, periodicals of various pharmaceutical disciplines. It subscribes to more than 1000 National and International journals of Pharmacy.

reviews.review_heading: Good college because of good working environment, good infrastructure, and good placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good, and they provided sufficient equipment for our research work, like UV, IR, GC, HPLC, DSC, LC-MS, and NMR. All this equipment was sufficient for the research activities in pharmaceutical analysis, and we were free to use it.

reviews.review_heading: College has good infrastructure and good faculties. This is one of the best colleges for pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and good lab facilities, which is used by students of every course to build their practical knowledge. The hostel facility and food are average.

reviews.review_heading: The college is worth for money if we put in full effort.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and classrooms are good enough. The infrastructure is well-built. It is very clean and good. It is very spacious enough for several purposes. Classrooms are very well-ventilated and disciplined. Daily cleaning of the rooms is done.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the placements, faculty members, and HOD, sir.
reviews.review_text: There is no campus life; the college has a small area and a very small canteen with limited entries. Basically, the college is like school with many restrictions, including limited leaves each year. Hindi-speaking people are very few. Basic facilities like internet, well-equipped labs with all necessary chemicals, and a library are available. Four girls stay in one room, which includes gym access, cupboards, hot/cold water, and drinking water. The college mess serves only vegetarian food, but th...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college of pharmacy in Mysore.
reviews.review_text: It is a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus with a well-equipped modern laboratory. The food served in the hostel is better. It has good environment, with a herbal garden. The canteen serves food at an affordable price. Our college provides health insurance and free treatment to students in JSS Hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and provides good education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not good. The building is under construction.

reviews.review_heading: JSS College of Pharmacy is a friendly college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by JSS are top-notch. They have proper labs with the proper equipment and give health facilities to students with free insurance. The library is excellent with every type of pharmacy book and magazine. The campus is fully secured by CCTV cameras and Wi-Fi at every corner. Classrooms are digital. The quality of the hostel is good, except for the food provided by the mess. The canteen is quite expensive for students. There is every type of sport to play, like basketball, vo...

reviews.review_heading: JSS College of Pharmacy is a good place to study a professional course.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good with Wi-Fi there in every section of the hostel. There is easy access to the internet and there are 2 badminton courts present in the hostel. There are other sports like basketball, volleyball and football also there. The labs and library are in good working order and are available to students at all times.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with a safe environment for everyone.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. The hostel has all the basic necessary commodities like Wi-Fi and a gym. Food quality is not great but is adjustable. The rooms are spacious with good ventilation. The campus has a lot of greenery with sports grounds for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course/department are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library etc. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, and the quality of food available in the mess is good. Medical facilities are available. Sports are conducted here.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and has value for money.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is very strong on campus. There is proper mess food and rooms are cozy with 2,  3, and 7 seater rooms. Washrooms are very clean. The hostel and mess workers are friendly. There is privacy. There is a gym. Football, basketball, cricket, volleyball, and badminton can be played.

reviews.review_heading: I am proud to be a part of this college that is ranked 8 by NIRF.
reviews.review_text: Labs available are world-class at the moment with an exception of the pharmacognosy department which is still renovating its outlook. Labs in our college provide state-of-the-art infrastructure and are always willing to let you use all the instruments for your research purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Really good campus life.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi system is good and fast. Labs are big, spacious and filled with newly developed systems and devices. The library has a whole lot collection of books. Mess is average with average food. The canteen is not good, I would prefer the hostel mess over the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: This university gets 1st rank in all universities in India.
reviews.review_text: This college consists of a gym and other physical games centers, with a good ambiance. The college hostel is free from ragging and has a warden who is very friendly and helpful. The hostels are open till 8.00 PM, and for girls, it is 7.00 PM. The hostel mess menu has vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and college gives lots of memories and infrastructure is so nice.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of college is very nice it provides a good atmosphere to students the college provide very speedy Wi-Fi and it has good and large library with every study material. Classroom are very large and with smart class.
Food in hostel is average and canteen provides a neat and good food it provide good medical facilities and it has basketball court.

college_info.intro:
University of Hyderabad provides various courses to students. It offers BTech and MBA programmes as its flagship courses. These courses are offered for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. Hyderabad University courses are offered in full-time mode and in several specialisations. Some of the popular specialisations offered under BTech and MBA programmes are Computer Science & Engineering, General, Health Care & Hospital Management, Business Analytics, etc.
The university focuses on critical and analytical thinking, knowledge creation, and discovery. University of Hyderabad BTech students are placed in top companies such as TCS, Deloitte, Tech Mahindra, Accentuere, Mercedes, etc. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the University of Hyderabad and their respective eligibility and the University of Hyderabad fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    The University of Hyderabad doesn't share a fixed minimum score for admission, and it changes every year. The selection process considers 60% from the CUET - PG exam and 40% from the interview. It's a good idea to aim for around 70% in the exam and prepare well for the interview. After the assessments, the university puts out a list of selected students to fill around 50 spots in the branch.

Other than this, candidates are also required to pay an application fee which is INR 600 and INR 550 for General and EWS category students, respectively. reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Ocean and Atmospheric Sciences - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is the best university for the M.Sc. in Ocean and Atmospheric Sciences course.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of students are successfully placed in our Hyderabad University. Our course has the highest package of 37 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3-7 LPA. Recruitment agencies include IMD, IIRS, MoES, and many others. Opportunities for internships are great, with more than 85% of students placed in good companies. The top roles offered are oceanographer, climate modeler, and more.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has very fast internet and the best library compared to all the colleges in India. Indira Gandhi Library is one of the best libraries with a lot of books and papers. The hotel quality and facilities are excellent. There are some of the best medical emergency centers on campus, and we also have excellent sports and games facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Financial Economics - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am fully satisfied with the course and dissatisfied with hostels.

review_content.Placements: Placement percentage is 12% - 15%. The highest package is 14 LPA. The lowest package is 5 LPA. The average package is 7 LPA. Recruiting companies are Federal Bank and Synchrony. Internship percentage is 20%. Roles and companies are research assistant in IITs, research institutes, RBI, and NABARD. Roles offered are research and data analysis.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good in the classroom. Toilets are neat and clean. Facilities available for PWD students. Wi-Fi is available. We don't have a library but a reading room. Hostel facility is not good. Food is not good and insects can be found in the food. We have many canteens on our campus and they are subsidized as well. Medical facilities are available all the time. Sports facilities are also provided.

course_faqs.question: Is Department of Communication, University of Hyderabad good for M.A.?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, the Department of Communication at the University of Hyderabad is a good institution for pursuing an M.A in Communication. The department has been ranked as the Best University Department many times in national surveys and has been ranked the Best University Department five times in a row by Outlook-MDRA. The M.A in Communication program offered by the department builds on a foundation of media and communication theory while equipping students with the skills, techniques, and understanding.

course_faqs.question: Why should I pursue M.A course from Department of Communication, University of Hyderabad?
course_faqs.answer: Though an MA degree is more inclined towards liberal arts as compared to fine arts, the candidates still have the option to pursue an MA degree in fine arts subjects such as fine arts, dance, music, etc. Getting an MA degree from UOHDOC can help the candidates land decent jobs in the relevant fields. After completing a master's level course in languages, one can easily get jobs in roles of translator, lingusit, foreign service officer, etc.

overview_faqs.question: Does KL University Hyderabad refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: KL University Hyderabad follows a specific cancellation and fee refund policy. Here are the key points:Processing Fees and Admission Fees:The processing fees and admission fees paid by the student are non-refundable under any circumstances.If a seat is cancelled 15 days before the notified last date of admission, only Rs 15,000/- will be deducted.Between 15 days and the notified last date of admission, Rs 25,000/- will be deducted as cancellation charges.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for University of Hyderabad?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for General and EWS category students is INR 600 and INR 550, respectively. On the other hand, the fee for OBC and SC/ ST/ PWD students is INR 400 and INR 275, respectively. In addition to this, students are also required to pay the entrance-exam specific application fee relevant to the course they are interested in. overview_faqs.question: Is University of Hyderabad campus safe?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Hyderabad University campus is safe for girls and boys. The college campus is located in Telangana. It has a good connection with roads and public transports. CCTV cameras are there in the campus to keep a check on students safety.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated Master in Optometry (M.OPT) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: The research scope is great here.

content.Placements: An optometrist role is offered at the initial average salary package that ranges from 4-5 LPA. Students generally get placed in hospitals. People do internships in a nearby hospital, which is linked to the university. Our university has 100% placements, and many of them opt to study abroad for better opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is top-notch, and we will get free Wi-Fi at every building with high-speed. Classrooms are also quite good with projectors. The library offers approximately 20,000 books 24x7. In hostels, rooms are average with good cleaning services. It also offers quite healthy and tasty food.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Health Psychology - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of my college.

content.Placements: We have a good placement cell on our campus. Every year, we use to invite them for the campus selection. We used to go for higher studies rather than going for a job, most of us are pursuing a Ph.D. now. Still, we have some opportunities to get a job. The list of companies includes Velammal Educational Institutions, DuPont, and some renowned IT companies. We can do an internship under a professor.
content.Infrastructure: The course is also vast, and the labs are so good. If anyone wants research, this is the best place to be. So, many labs and many research programs happen here. Seminars from international professors are also very frequent. Exams and labs make a hectic schedule. Exams are very frequent. There are 3 minor and 1 major happen for one subject, with lab exams. The hostel is so good here, and the infrastructure is also very good. Everything is good and clean. Each room has only 2 members, so not a problem at all. Playgrounds are available at hostels. The gym is also there for students, which is very nice. For every semester, the hostel fees are so feasible for everyone.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Ocean and Atmospheric Sciences - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is the best university for the M.Sc. in Ocean and Atmospheric Sciences course.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students are successfully placed in our Hyderabad University. Our course has the highest package of 37 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3-7 LPA. Recruitment agencies include IMD, IIRS, MoES, and many others. Opportunities for internships are great, with more than 85% of students placed in good companies. The top roles offered are oceanographer, climate modeler, and more.
content.Infrastructure: It has very fast internet and the best library compared to all the colleges in India. Indira Gandhi Library is one of the best libraries with a lot of books and papers. The hotel quality and facilities are excellent. There are some of the best medical emergency centers on campus, and we also have excellent sports and games facilities.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Financial Economics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am fully satisfied with the course and dissatisfied with hostels.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is 12% - 15%. The highest package is 14 LPA. The lowest package is 5 LPA. The average package is 7 LPA. Recruiting companies are Federal Bank and Synchrony. Internship percentage is 20%. Roles and companies are research assistant in IITs, research institutes, RBI, and NABARD. Roles offered are research and data analysis.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good in the classroom. Toilets are neat and clean. Facilities available for PWD students. Wi-Fi is available. We don't have a library but a reading room. Hostel facility is not good. Food is not good and insects can be found in the food. We have many canteens on our campus and they are subsidized as well. Medical facilities are available all the time. Sports facilities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Best affordable university with great amenities.

content.Placements: As far as I know, you will have a good placement percentage but don't expect a package like 20LPA. If you are well talented, you can surely get placements as many companies will come for placements. The eligibility criteria depend upon the company, and some companies have minimum CGPA but some consider an interview irrespective of your CGPA. As I am still in 2nd semester this much only I can provide information about this section.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is another thing I personally like about this university as everywhere can get ramps for disabled students. Well maintained hostels and different blocks for different branches are there. There is an open theatre for events and a beautiful auditorium for seminars. There will be 24/7 library. Wi-Fi facility is there everywhere. Hostels are also nice and spacious. The food is a bit average.

admission_overview.college_name: University of Hyderabad Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Fees, Dates & Seats

admission_overview.title: University of Hyderabad Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: University of Hyderabad admission to all the courses is based on the entrance exam. Hyderabad University, also known as the Central University of Hyderabad, presently offers PG, integrated and doctorate courses in the stream of Science, Management, Engineering and Law across its constituent schools or departments. All the PG and doctorate courses at the University campus are offered under its 12 schools and 41 departments. On the other hand, integrated MA and MSc programmes are offered via the College of Integrated Studies. The University conducts an entrance exam for admission to MSc, MA, MPA, MFA, MPH, Executive MBA, MBA and PhD programmes. However, it also accepts several national-level entrance exams for MTech, MBA and PhD admissions. In addition to this, this University also offers distance learning courses through its Centre for Distance and Virtual Learning.

eligibility_selection.title: University of Hyderabad Eligibility & Selection 2025

In addition to this, the university also accepts scores of national-level entrance exams like CAT, NIMCET, UGC NET and CSIR NET for admission to MBA, MCA, MTech and PhD programmes. A few of the popular HU courses offered along with their accepted entrance exams are mentioned below: Course

faqs.answer: The Hyderabad University entrance exam is moderately tough as it requires examination of both subject matter and analytical skills. The level of competition varies on the basis of the number of applicants versus the seats available in a programme. Since most courses today admit students based on CUET, strategies for preparation must be in accordance with that pattern of the exam. Students can cope with the level of difficulty with regular study and practice.

cutoff_tables: Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Materials Engineering
courses_data.description: At the UG level, the HU runs a 4-year BE/BTech programme for those interested in pursuing engineering. The minimum eligibility for the same is passing Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics and having a valid JEE Main score. The University lays down eligibility and cut-offs every year to shortlist candidates. Fees for BE/BTech at University of Hyderabad are modest when compared to most private colleges, and significant dates for application are announced on the official admission website in advance.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech courses are offered at the University of Hyderabad?

The School of Computer and Information Sciences under UoH has introduced this five year Integrated M.Tech programme with effect from the academic year 2014-15. Cut off are differant when it comes to other categories or female candidates and even domicile of home state. Admission to Integrated BTech +M.Techin Computer Science in UoH - University of Hyderabad is based on the scores obtained in the entrance exam JEE. Applicants are advised to confirm what category are they applying while che

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at University of Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: The University of Hyderabad asks the students to pass Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as mandatory subjects. In addition, students must score a valid JEE Main and apply for BE/BTech admission. The eligibility is being fixed, so the students have sound knowledge in the Science stream. They must also refer to the official notice for category-wise relaxation and cut-off information.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for BTech at University of Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: The University of Hyderabad BE/BTech admission procedure is carried out through JEE Main. Shortlisted candidates for JEE Main are required to apply through the official University portal and follow the counselling procedure. Allocation is made on rank, preference, and availability basis. Actual admission is only finalized upon document verification and fee deposition at the University.

courses_data.name: University of Hyderabad MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The University of Hyderabad extends a two-year full-time MBA course to the students across General specialisation along with Health Care & Hospital Management and Business Analytics specialisations. Candidates seeking admission to the MBA must have completed a three-year bachelor’s degree with first class (or its equivalent with 60% aggregate) in any discipline. Also, candidates must also have a valid score inCAT exam.

faqs.question: Does University of Hyderabad offer MBA course?
faqs.answer: Yes, the School of Management Studies under the University of Hyderabad offers a two-year full-time MBA course to the students. Available across General specialisation along with Health Care & Hospital Management and Business Analytics specialisations. The General MBA programme is also available across multiple electives, namely HRM, Finance, Operations Management, Marketing, Banking, Entrepreneurship and Business Analytics specialisations. Read more onMBA at the University of Hyderabad here.

faqs.answer: The University of Hyderabad has a two-year full-time MBA programme with various options. The students can opt for General MBA or special streams like Health Care & Hospital Management and Business Analytics. These are curricula that focus on delivering special knowledge as well as core management skills. The course is to equip the student with leadership positions across industries.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Hyderabad University for MCA on the basis of TSICET entrance exam score?
faqs.answer: No, you can get admission in the University of Hyderabad for MCA on the basis of your scores obtained in NIMCET (National Institute of Technology Master of Computer Applications Common Entrance Test) only. NIMCET scores, in order of merit, will be the basis for admission which is done by the counselling at the University of Hyderabad. Interested candidates need to apply to the University of Hyderabad and separately need to provide their NIMCET scores in the application form.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Hyderabad University for MCA on the basis of TSICET entrance exam score?

faqs.question: How to get a seat at University of Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: University of Hyderabad admission to most of the courses is based on the entrance exam conducted by the UoH. In addition to this, it also accepts several national-level entrance exams for admission to MBA, MCA M.Tech and Ph.D. programmes. While for MBA, the university accepts admission only through its own entrance exam, for various UG and PG courses, the university accepts admission through CUET UG and CUET-PG entrance exams.

faqs.question: What types of courses are offered at University of Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: Hyderabad University offers a wide range of PG and doctorate courses at the University campus under its 12 schools and 41 departments. On the other hand, it also offers integrated MA and MSc programmes are offered via the College of Integrated Studies. The University conducts an entrance exam for admission to MSc, MA, MPA, MFA, MPH, Executive MBA, MBA and PhD programmes. However, it also accepts several national-level entrance exams for MTech, MBA and PhD admissions. In addition to this, the University also offers distance learning courses through its Centre for Distance and Virtual Learning. Check out more onUniversity of Hyderabad courses here.

faqs.question: Does University of Hyderabad accept JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, as per the official website,Class of HyderabadacceptsClass8 Main scoresfor final admission to the University of Hyderabad. For the same, however, students are also required to be in the top 20 percentile of successful candidates in their respectiveClass 12(or equivalent) exam of the respective stream and/ or boardORthe candidate must have secured a minimum of 75% aggregate (for General or OBC-NCL category) or a minimum of 65% aggregate (for SC, ST or PWD category) in the Class 12 (or equivalent) exam of respective stream and board.

faqs.question: What are the cutoff marks required for M.A. at Department of Communication, University of Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: The University of Hyderabad doesn't share a fixed minimum score for admission, and it changes every year. The selection process considers 60% from the CUET - PG exam and 40% from the interview. It's a good idea to aim for around 70% in the exam and prepare well for the interview. After the assessments, the university puts out a list of selected students to fill around 50 spots in the branch.

placement_report.college_name: University of Hyderabad Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: University of Hyderabad Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to the media reports, the highest package offered during the University of Hyderabad placements 2025 was INR 46 LPA. More than 180 recruiters participated in the placement session 2024 and placed 550 students of the 2025 batch. Some of the top recruiters who visited the University of Hyderabad for 2025 placements include TCS, Deloitte, Oracle, Teradata, ICICI Bank, Federal Bank , etc.

According to the official data available, two MTech students and 4 IMTech students received offers as Interns at GE Digital during the Hyderabad University placements 2024. Earlier, in April 2023, Marvell visited the campus and recruited 5 IMTech and 3 MTech students as Interns. Moreover, the highest and lowest package offered during University of Hyderabad placements 2023 for its School of Computing and Information Sciences (SCIS) stood at INR 23 LPA and INR 3.5 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of University of Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: In University of Hyderabad, fees once paid, no amount is refunded. The cancellation is not permitted to the candidates in case of registrtion fee paid in advance. Based on candidates request for a refund, for any reason, it will be dealt with as per the University's policy. If candidate are eligible to get the refund, the refund will be initiated after confirmation from the various departments and our bank. It may take quite some time, so be patient to get the refund.

faqs.question: How costly is University of Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: University of Hyderabad is a government university. Hence, the fee is not very high. Even if the students feel the fee as high worry not. These students can apply for scholarships. faqs.question: What is the fee for MSc at Hyderabad University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MSc and Integrated MSc at the University of Hyderabad ranges between INR 6,770 and INR 55,950. This fee, however, is sourced from the unofficial sources. faqs.question: What is the application fee for University of Hyderabad?

faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of University of Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: In University of Hyderabad, fees once paid, no amount is refunded. The cancellation is not permitted to the candidates in case of registrtion fee paid in advance. Based on candidates request for a refund, for any reason, it will be dealt with as per the University's policy. If candidate are eligible to get the refund, the refund will be initiated after confirmation from the various departments and our bank. It may take quite some time, so be patient to get the refund.

description: University of Hyderabad cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the University of Hyderabad JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

University of Hyderabad JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.
For more cutoff details, check out the table below:

For the General AI category students, the University of Hyderabad B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 42217 and 127215 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 42217 and 127215, Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Computer Science and Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Materials Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at University of Hyderabad. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at University of Hyderabad to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of University of Hyderabad. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and M.Tech. in Bioinformatics with last round cutoff scores of 452 and 448, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 435 and 452. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 350 and 381 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at UoH - University of Hyderabad. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

According to the last round University of Hyderabad CCMT cutoff 2025, MTech/ME brances, such as Artificial Intelligence and Bioinformatics, saw higher cutoffs, while on the other hand, MTech in Computer Science. in comparsion had relaxed cutoff score for the General AI category. For the OBC AI quota, the GATE Cutoff 2025, varied from 350 to 381, with M.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence being the most challenging for admission. highlights.description:
One of India’s top institutes is University of Hyderabad. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #26 under the category Overall, #18 under University, #74 under Engineering, and #32 under Research Institutions. At the international level, QS World Rankings 2025 has ranked the institute at #801-850 position. University of Hyderabad is top ranked by multiple national & international ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the University of Hyderabad rankings.
Read less

nirf.description:
University of Hyderabad has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, University of Hyderabad fell 1 rank to #26 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, University of Hyderabad fell 1 rank to #18 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, University of Hyderabad fell 4 ranks to #74 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, University of Hyderabad's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

qs_world.description:
University of Hyderabad has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the QS World University Rankings 2026. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the University of Hyderabad's rankings in 'Top Global Universities' category have displayed stability in trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2026, University of Hyderabad's rank is #801, the same as last year's rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Asia' category have demonstrated a decreasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, University of Hyderabad fell 7 ranks to #246 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Rankings achieved by the institute under the 'Southern Asia' category have exibited a decreasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, University of Hyderabad fell 3 ranks to #53 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

highlights: Standard cricket pavilion and full-size ground

A volleyball court and an open Karate dojo

hostel.description:
There are altogether 21 hostels on the University campus, of which 13 hostels are for men and 8 are for women. Foreign students, unless they opt not to, are accommodated at the Tagore International House.

The University also provides reservation of the total number of seats in the hostels, 22.5% are reserved for candidates belonging to SC/ST and 3% for physically challenged students.

data: Hostels, Library, Labs, Sports Facilities, Canteen, etc

library.description:
University Library has rich collection of 4.53 lakh books, e-journals, e-books, reference books, serials, theses & dissertations, back volumes of journals, maps etc. The Library has a separate book bank for SC/ST students and 2500 braille books for visually challenged students. Apart from this, the Library has
received 642 books as gift from various sources worth approximately Rs.3.4 lakhs. The Library had renewed subscriptions to 230 plus print journals and 48 plus databases covering more than 40,000 e-journals.
The Library is also a member of Universal digital project of Carnegie-Melon University, Pittsburg, USA(Million books to the Web). Under this project, a scanning center was established in the Library to digitize rare books. The Library has signed MoU with UGC-INFLIBNET Centre, Ahmedabad, to digitize and upload full text Ph.D. theses submitted to University of Hyderabad.

reviews.review_heading: The research scope is great here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is top-notch, and we will get free Wi-Fi at every building with high-speed. Classrooms are also quite good with projectors. The library offers approximately 20,000 books 24x7. In hostels, rooms are average with good cleaning services. It also offers quite healthy and tasty food.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The course is also vast, and the labs are so good. If anyone wants research, this is the best place to be. So, many labs and many research programs happen here. Seminars from international professors are also very frequent. Exams and labs make a hectic schedule. Exams are very frequent. There are 3 minor and 1 major happen for one subject, with lab exams. The hostel is so good here, and the infrastructure is also very good. Everything is good and clean. Each room has only 2 members, so not a pro...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best university for the M.Sc. in Ocean and Atmospheric Sciences course.
reviews.review_text: It has very fast internet and the best library compared to all the colleges in India. Indira Gandhi Library is one of the best libraries with a lot of books and papers. The hotel quality and facilities are excellent. There are some of the best medical emergency centers on campus, and we also have excellent sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with the course and dissatisfied with hostels.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good in the classroom. Toilets are neat and clean. Facilities available for PWD students. Wi-Fi is available. We don't have a library but a reading room. Hostel facility is not good. Food is not good and insects can be found in the food. We have many canteens on our campus and they are subsidized as well. Medical facilities are available all the time. Sports facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Best affordable university with great amenities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is another thing I personally like about this university as everywhere can get ramps for disabled students. Well maintained hostels and different blocks for different branches are there. There is an open theatre for events and a beautiful auditorium for seminars. There will be 24/7 library. Wi-Fi facility is there everywhere. Hostels are also nice and spacious. The food is a bit average.

reviews.review_heading: If you're planning to come here for studying M.A. Economics, please don't.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure is very poorly planned and designed. Apart from old and depressing architecture, the locations of different buildings are also not well thought out. Some of the hostels are in the north campus and some are in the south, which are 3-4 km apart. Some departments are in the middle, some are in the east campus (3 km from the north campus), and some are in the south. There aren't enough buses to carry all the students to their respective classes. But, the library is in the middle, ...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied as they are very affordable, large campus area, and have a lot of greenery.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is up to the mark especially in south campus whereas it is not as much good in north as they all are so old. South campus hostels are well-equipped with geyser, RO, water cooler, and Wi-Fi both LAN and outer near to rooms. We need not worry about the classrooms as they are best in infrastructure wise with the modern equipment. Labs are also well maintained. Hostels need a little bit of maintenance but academic buildings are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities. Everyone is friendly.
reviews.review_text: We have a big library where many books are available. We have playgrounds, a gym, and yoga. Many tournaments are held here. The food is good, and hostels are always clean. We have a separate medical center where people there take care of us. Wi-Fi is provided in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: UOH is one of the best universities if you are looking for research. Faculty members are really good
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is really good; some of the buildings of the college are really good. Wi-Fi, the library, and all are really good. In the hostel, we have to stay with 2 members in each room, and ethernet facilities are available in all hostels. The food quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: This institute has got the title of "Institute of Eminence."
reviews.review_text: This university has a library named Indira Gandhi Memorial. It has many books and journals for every respective field. The books here cover linguistics, such as Hindi and Urdu, and technology engineering. Many clubs are running here, such as the Arts, Dance, Science, and Junior Clubs, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied! It's really a great college.
reviews.review_text: Food quality is very good and offers many dishes in one place. There is a big library with seating arrangements, and we can also borrow books from the library for study. Computer labs and science labs are available. Our college has plenty of space with multiple washrooms and ample space with an auditorium and multiple computer labs. We have a huge cricket playground with turfs. Great Wi-Fi connection.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Computer Science in University of Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text:
The hostel is good but not too clean, with corridors full of dogs but not much charm.
Labs are good except when it comes to computer labs. 
There are study rooms, reading rooms, and libraries open 24/7 except on some major holidays. 
Okay canteen, faculty members, and good medical facilities. Not much support in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Integrated economics at the University of Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: College campus is very big and full of greenery. Department buildings have good and advanced facilities. There is 24/7 library and reading room are avilable. Wi-Fi is enabled in hostels and all public places. Good indoor, outdoor sports facilities, and good gym facilities. Hostel rooms are decent with 2 students per room.

reviews.review_heading: Curriculum and campus environment are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing. Over 2300 acres campus with good connectivity, free bus service, advanced department building, and classrooms. Big and decent library which is 24/7 open. Full-time Wi-Fi is available in all public areas, including the shopping complex, hostels, lecture halls, and departments. Hostel rooms are good we have to share a room with one of our roommates. All other basic facilities are available such as gym, stadium, and sports complex for almost all indoor and outdoor sports....

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, but administration is poor.
reviews.review_text: Bad condition of infrastructure and technology, provided by the administration, buildings are in worse condition in my school, but the library is the finest place where students rush to. The mess condition is even worse, but the quality of food sanitation is good.

data.description: CAT scores are only compulsory for admission to the General MBA at the University of Hyderabad. However, for an MBA in Health Care and Hospital Management, the entrance exam will be for 75 marks. Moreover, the weightage for the written exam will be 60%, the weightage for the Group Discussion will be 15 % and the weightage for the Personal Interview. Additionally, for MBA in business Analytics, the selection process is similar to MBA in HHCM.

paragraphs: The total tuition fee for MSc and Integrated MSc at the University of Hyderabad ranges between INR 6,770 and INR 55,950. This fee, however, is sourced from the unofficial sources. On the other hand, the application fee for OBC and SC/ ST/ PWD students is INR 400 and INR 275, respectively.

The application fee for General and EWS category students is INR 600 and INR 550, respectively. On the other hand, the fee for OBC and SC/ ST/ PWD students is INR 400 and INR 275, respectively. In addition to this, students are also required to pay the entrance-exam specific application fee relevant to the course they are interested in. To check the application fee for the UoH-accepted exams, click on the following relevant links:
The BA fee structure at UOH is inclusive of multiple components. These components are tuition fees, hostel fees, hostel fees, etc. Combining al, the fees range from INR 35,310 – 50,120.
The fee amount mentioned here is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

In University of Hyderabad, fees once paid, no amount is refunded. The cancellation is not permitted to the candidates in case of registrtion fee paid in advance. Based on candidates request for a refund, for any reason, it will be dealt with as per the University's policy. The university also provides diploma, certificate, and various other courses to students.

review_content.Placements: I have heard that 50 to 70% of students get placed every year in my branch, which is the IT B.Tech. This college has a library of its own and has all the labs, good classrooms, and smart classes as well. It also has a lift for disabled people and teachers. There is no hostel of its own, but you can see one. Other than that, it does have its canteen and a café near the canteen. It has a stationery and juice shop. It has a photocopy and printout facility. Lab manuals are available in stationery. The library offers many books, including course books, but you should first get your library card.
