overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for MBA at DAVV?
overview_faqs.answer: Candidates must take part in the DAVV admission process before the last date of admission. DAVV application form must be filled out before the last date of application. Candidates must know their eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. The university offers UG, PG, and various other courses to students. The fees for MBA at DAVV is tabulated below: CoursesTotal tuition FeesMBA/PGDM (103 courses)INR 30,800 - INR 2.4 lakh

overview_faqs.question: Can I get a refund if I cancel my admission from DAVV?
overview_faqs.answer: In DAVV, fees once paid will be fully refunded. But the university have some rules and regulation to be followed by the candidates to get full refund. If any candidate wants to cancel the admission, he / she should be apply in prescribed proforma. To fill out the proforma, candidates are required to visit the university official website. In case, if any candidate leaves the program, the fees will be refunded as per the guidelines of UGC. If a candidate leaves any program after the said date, only caution money will be refunded.

overview_faqs.question: Is there any online fee payment portal at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya?
overview_faqs.answer: DAV has an online fee payment portal. The university provides a single platform to submit all fees. Visit DAV website and click on the online fee payment tab. Choose the courses to enrol in and proceed with the payment. It will redirect to a payment gateway, where fees can be paid using a debit card, credit card, or net banking.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for UG and PG programmes of DAVV?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for both UG and PG programmes at DAVV University is the same. Students applying to either UG or PG programmes have to pay an application fee of INR 1550.

review_summary.college_name: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: The college is good in comparison to other Madhya Pradesh government medical colleges.

content.Placements: In India, there is a lack of healthcare workers, especially good doctors, so all students are well settled and placed in different hospitals. The highest package in the MBBS course totally depends on you and your capabilities. In MBBS, after 4.5 years, we have to do a 1-year internship in our college-associated hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has most of the things found in the best medical colleges. Our college has a large building area, and above-average facilities are available. The quality of food is also good, provided for 2200 Rs. Our canteen is not that great, and the sports area is also average, with all facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The facilities and placements are decent, but the fees are a bit high.

content.Placements: Currently, I am in the 1st year of the SGSITS Indore Electrical Engineering branch. Approximately 60% of the total students were placed in core and technical sectors. The highest package was 19 LPA offered by ORACLE Inc. in a technical role. The average was 7.5 LPA. The lowest package was 3.5 LPA offered by TCS. The top recruiters include Havells, Oracle, Deloitte, and TCS. The top roles were in core and technical sectors.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by the college are decent, but the fees being charged for them are a bit too high. The classrooms and labs are equipped with all the required instruments. The library is good, and a lot of books are available here that are needed for every course. The food is decent, but again, the fees are very high. The total fees for a semester are 48,000 rupees. The sports facilities are not that good, but you can play almost all the casual games. The gymkhana is good and is equipped with all the workout equipment, and the charges are 400 rupees per month.

individual_reviews.title: DAVV Indore is a good college.

content.Placements: Many companies come for placements. Top companies from Indore also come for placements. The DAVV Placement Cell conducts exams for particular companies. Around 70 to 80 percent of students get placed with good packages. In 2026, the average package at Infosys is 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Boys’ and girls’ hostels are available with proper hygiene. The boys’ hostel closes at 11 PM, and the girls’ hostel closes at 9 PM. Two students share one room. Each room has an almirah, table, chair, and internet connection.

faqs.question: What is DAVV Indore cutoff 2024 for CSE?
faqs.answer: DAVV Indore accepts JEE Main for admission to BE in CSE. DAVV Indore cutoff 2024 for CSE admission was45829for the General AI category candidates. For the PWD AI category candidates, the cutoff rank closed at52383. For the General Home State category, the cutoff was closed at396374.

courses_data.name: DAVV BTech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MP BE, JEE Main, CUET, MPPET, CBSE 12th, ISC, MPBSE 12th
courses_data.description: DAVV University in Indore provides full-time BTech courses that last for four years. To get admitted, students need to perform well in entrance exams such as JEE Main and then attend counselling organised by DTE, Bhopal. Students must have finished their Class 12 education with a minimum of 45 to 50 per cent marks. The programme includes several different engineering fields for students who want to pursue a career in Engineering.

faqs.question: How to get admission to BTech at DAVV?
faqs.answer: DAVVoffers BE/BTech courses to students in full-time mode only. The final admission process shall take place through the counselling conducted by DTE, Bhopal. The accepted entrance exams for BTech is JEE Main, CUET, MP BE, and others. Students must check theJEE Main exam pattern,JEE Main preparation guidelines, and thebest books for JEE Main preparation.Candidates must apply online on the official website by following a step-by-step application procedure. The first step in the application proces

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted for BTech at DAVV University?
faqs.answer: DAVV University accepts scores from JEE Main and MPPET for admission into BTech programmes. These exams are required for getting a seat through DTE counselling. Students need to register for these exams individually.

faqs.question: What is DAVV Indore cutoff 2024 for CSE?
faqs.answer: DAVV Indore accepts JEE Main for admission to BE in CSE. DAVV Indore cutoff 2024 for CSE admission was45829for the General AI category candidates. For the PWD AI category candidates, the cutoff rank closed at52383. For the General Home State category, the cutoff was closed at396374.

faqs.question: Can a student get admission to DAVV without CUET?
faqs.answer: Admission withoutCUET (Common University Entrance Test)is possible for some courses only like LL. M., and others. but for these courses,CUET-PGis accepted by the university. So, students can get admission without CUET but the student have to change the course they are opting for. So, the best solution is to prepare in advance for theCUETand get admission in the relevant course. Seats are limited and candidates applying through CUET are many. Only good preparation can assist in getting admission to various courses likeBTech,BSc, B.A. and others.

placement_report.college_name: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: DAVV Indore Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: DAVV Indore placements 2024 is ongoing. According to media reports, a total of 16 companies have visited the campus and 150 students have secured jobs during the on-going DAVV Indore placements 2024. Further, students from MCA and BE have got outstanding placements during placements 2024 drive. The highest and average package recorded in 2024 was INR 24 LPA and INR 8.7 LPA . The median package offered during BTech placements 2023 was INR 6.5 LPA. MBA median package in 2023 stood at INR 5.75 LPA. BTech and MBA median package are as per the NIRF report 2024.

The highest package offered in 2023 was INR 113 LPA while the average package stood at INR 6.32 LPA . Further, a total of 1,408 offers and 1,022 unique offers were made during DAVV placements 2023. Apart from this, a total of 105 companies visited the campus during DAVV Indore placements 2023. The top recruiters of DAVV Indore in 2023 included Accenture, Cognizant and Amazon.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered during DAVV Indore placements?
faqs.answer: According to media reports, the average package offered during DAVV Indore placements 2024 stood at INR 8.7 LPA , respectively. Earlier, the overall average package offered during DAVV Indore placements 2023 stood at INR 6.32 LPA. Further, an improving trend was witnessed in the average package offered over the past three years during DAVV Indore placements, which is presented below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2021) Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Average package INR 5.2 LPA INR 5.57 LPA INR 6.32 LPA Further, the Institute-wise average salary trends witnessed during DAVV Indore placements over the past two years are presented below: Institute Name Average Package (2022) Average Package (2023) Institute of Engineering & Technology ( BE , ME / MTech , MSc ) INR 6 LPA INR 7.29 LPA International Institute of Professional Studies ( MCA , BCom , MTech ) INR 5.38 LPA INR 5.90 LPA School of Computing Science & IT ( BA ) INR MCA , MSc, MBA ) INR 4.62 LPA INR 4.74 LPA Institute of Management Studies ( MBA ) INR 5.70 LPA INR 6.16 LPA School of Data Science & Forecasting ( MTech , MBA , MSc ) INR 3.39 LPA INR 4.18 LPA School of Economics ( MA , BA ) INR 5.72 LPA INR 4.69 LPA

faqs.question: What is the total fee for the DAVV Indore BTech course?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BTech from DAVV Indore is INR 1.6L to INR 3L according to official sources but may change. For more information about other fee components such as hostel fee, admission fee, etc., get in touch with the university directly.

faqs.question: What is the yearly fees of DAVV?
faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, the Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya offers three to five-year B.Sc. , B.Tech/ B.E . BBA and other courses to students. B.E. Is offered in six specialisations. The fee for B.E. /B.Tech, B.Sc. B.A. And MBA is INR 1.6 Lacs - INR 3 Lacs, INR 12,000 - INR 3.6 Lacs, INR 21,000 - INR 4.05 Lacs, and INR 30.8 K - INR 2.4 L, respectively. This is the full course tuition fee. For yearly fee information, please visit the official website of Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya. If any student finds the fee a little high, they can always apply for the scholarships offered by the university.

description: DAVV cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the DAVV JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

DAVV cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff was 56342 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Information Technology turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 52729.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 56342.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

DAVV offers MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery through NEET scores for home-state admissions. Candidates seeking admission to the DAVV MBBS course must have a valid score in NEET to be eligible for a further round of admissions. Going as per the previous year's DAVV cutoff, there has been a drastic change in the range of cutoffs. As per DAVV NEET cutoff 2023, the Round 3 Seat Allotment result was 71482, whereas in 2022, it was 62163 and in 2021, it was 68611. From the cutoff tre

NEET UG is a national-level exam for admission to undergraduate medical and paramedical courses offered in India. Candidates can check out the latest NEET UG important dates related to the DAVV cutoff in the table below:

DAVV accepts NEET PG scores for admission to the MD courses across four specialisations. As of now DAVV cut off 2024 based on NEET PG has been concluded. The closing rank for NEET PG Mop-Up Round Seat Allotment result for MD in Bio-Chemistry is 91173 and for MD in Microbiology it is 68868. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the year-wise DAVV cutoff for the General category students:
Candidates can download the year-wise DAVV NEET PG round-wise seat allotment lists for the General category students from the table given below:

Along with the NEET PG scores, DAVV accepts MP NEET PG scores for admission to the MD and MS. Going as per the last year DAVV cutoff, the closing ranks for MP NEET PG Mop-Up Round Seat Allotment result for MD in Pathology is 313 and for MS in Ophthalmology it is 385. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the year-wise MP NEET PG cutoff for the General category students:
Considering the DAVV B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top most competitive specialisation for General AI category students was B.Tech. in Information Technology, with last-round closing rank of 56342.
Under the HS quota, the top most competitive B.E. / B.Tech specialisation was B.Tech. in Information Technology, with last-round closing rank of 57886.

Other than the NEET UG exam, DAVV offers MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery through MP NEET scores. Students must have a valid score in MP NEET to be eligible for a further round of admissions. Going as per the previous year's DAVV cutoffs, the MP NEET UG cutoffs were similar to that of the NEET UG wherein, the 2023 cutoff stood at 71482 for the General Home State category candidates. Candidates can check out the previous year's MP NEET closing ranks for the DAVV MBBS cutoff in

Talking about the last three years' MPPET cutoff, DAVV cutoff 2024 for BHM closed at 10 while in 2022 it closed at 46 and in 2021 at 17. The aforementioned cutoff is of IPS Academy, an affiliate of DAVV. Also, for BHM, DAVV has witnessed a declining trend over the years for the General category students. Candidates can refer to the table given below to check out DAVV past year trends for several courses across various categories:

DAVV offers admission to MBA courses based on MPMET score. The University offers MBA courses through the affiliated colleges. Going as per last year's DAVV cutoff trend, candidates must have a valid rank range of MPMET score to be eligible for admissions. Considering the DAVV cutoff 2024, the percentile for the MBA course at Lal Bahadur Shastri Institute of Technology and Management affiliated with DAVV stood at 80. highlights.description: One of India’s top institutes is DAVV. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #49 under the category State Public University. DAVV is top ranked by multiple national ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the DAVV rankings.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, DAVV has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'University' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2025, DAVV fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, DAVV climbed 1 rank to #49 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Infrastructure: Campus Facilities

hostel.description: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidhyalaya has 6 boys and 6 girls hostels for the students.All the hostels have basic amenities like water purifiers, common room, recreation room, mess, TV, laundry services, security and surveillance system etc.

data: Library, Cafeteria, Hostel, Sports Complex, Auditorium, Research centres, Medical services, etc.

library.description: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidhyalaya central library is equipped with books, periodicals, latest national and international e-Journals. The University has more than 6 lacs books, 23,450 Ph.D. theses, 8,965 e-books and e-journals in various subjects. Adequate reprographic and internet facility with online national and international journals, with connectivity under UGC-INFLIBNET are available in the library.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Volleyball Court, Hockey

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Mahatma Gandhi Memorial Medical College, IndoreReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good in comparison to other Madhya Pradesh government medical colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has most of the things found in the best medical colleges. Our college has a large building area, and above-average facilities are available. The quality of food is also good, provided for 2200 Rs. Our canteen is not that great, and the sports area is also average, with all facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The facilities and placements are decent, but the fees are a bit high.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are decent, but the fees being charged for them are a bit too high. The classrooms and labs are equipped with all the required instruments. The library is good, and a lot of books are available here that are needed for every course. The food is decent, but again, the fees are very high. The total fees for a semester are 48,000 rupees. The sports facilities are not that good, but you can play almost all the casual games. The gymkhana is good and is equipped ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Acropolis Institute of Technology and ResearchReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: College facilities are not that good when compared to their fees and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The infrastructure of the college can be better and more presentable according to its fee. In my opinion, the quality of food is not good, but they can improve it. Sports competitions are held in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Acropolis Institute of Technology and ResearchReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and placement, as heard by me, but I have not experienced the placement part.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi doesn't work at all. You need to get its password, which is hardly possible. The network doesn't work at all. This college has a library of its own and has all the labs, good classrooms, and smart classes as well. It also has a lift for disabled people and teachers. There is no hostel of its own, but you can see one. Other than that, it does have its canteen and a café near the canteen. It has a stationery and juice shop. It has a photocopy and printout facility. Lab manuals are available ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila CampusReviewed on 13 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: DAVV Indore is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Boys’ and girls’ hostels are available with proper hygiene. The boys’ hostel closes at 11 PM, and the girls’ hostel closes at 9 PM. Two students share one room. Each room has an almirah, table, chair, and internet connection.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Chameli Devi Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college environment with decent fees.
reviews.review_text: The campus of the college is good, with well-built buildings constructed, and a good atmosphere, all greenery is present. Wi-Fi labs and libraries are well-managed. Classrooms a are decent. Hostel facility available for the students. Boys' and girls' hostels are separate. Mess and canteen football decent. You can play sports and games in your free time.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Acropolis Institute of Technology and ResearchReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good government college, campus crowd with decent marks.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good, but it is far away from the main Indore city. Wi-Fi, labs, and libraries are present. Classrooms are decent. Girls' and boys' hostels are available in this college for the students. The taste of the hostel food is very decent. Canteen food is good. Sports and games you can play in college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila CampusReviewed on 1 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My life at the IET DAVV Indore (Madhya Pradesh).
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, etc., are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Acropolis Institute of Technology and ResearchReviewed on 1 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This is the best college in Indore and it is run by RGPV University.
reviews.review_text: There is no internet in the college and there is no hostel. The canteen is also average and the food there is also average. There is a Wi-Fi facility but it is not for the students, only for the faculty. Campus B is average, not very big, it is normal.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Indore Institute of LawReviewed on 29 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: About law, learning, and growth.
reviews.review_text: The department is equipped with Wi-Fi enabled classrooms, modern lecture halls, and seminar rooms. A well-stocked library is available with both physical and digital resources. The environment supports academic as well as practical training. Hostel, mess, medical supports, and sports facilities are clean, secure, and well-maintained. The mess and canteen offer hygiene and decent quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila CampusReviewed on 29 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the food in the hostel.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi of the hostel network is good. Labs are also outstanding, but the lectures are minimal. My suggestion is that the food in the hostel and the water are not good, so I do not eat there. Medical facilities are not available in the college. These are outside the college.  I have no idea about sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Acropolis Institute of Management Studies and ResearchReviewed on 27 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of infrastructure, learning environment, campus life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are excellent. Classrooms are well-managed and clean, including whiteboards and projectors. A central library is there with relevant books for courses. Wi-Fi facility is available, and computer labs for different departments with science labs are also there. Along with 2 canteens with a variety of food items.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Acropolis Institute of Technology and ResearchReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for studies and placement with low JEE marks.
reviews.review_text: A college campus with modern infrastructure, Wi-Fi, labs, and a central library is available for the students. Girls' and boys' hostels are available in the college for the students. Mess food is acceptable, not too good, and canteen food is good. A games tournament happens in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila CampusReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good government college. I got decent marks in JEE Main.
reviews.review_text: The college campus area is good and huge. The college campus is covered with many trees and plants, and it seems like college is in the jungle. Wi-Fi, labs, library, and all good facilities are available in the college for students. Mason canteen food is acceptable. College is directly connected with Indore Icchapur Highway. Sports and games happen in college.

faqs.answer: A:    Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences (MCOPS) has a 90% placement record for B.Pharm graduates. faqs.answer: A:    Candidates need to pass Class 12 or equivalent with Physics, Chemistry, English with Biology/ Mathematics as optional subjects to apply for Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences BPharm programme. Besides, aspirants must also pass Manipal Entrance Test for admission to BPharm programme.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Pharm at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences?

faqs.answer: A:    The question of whether a B.Pharma programme at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences (MCOPS) is "expensive" depends on your own circumstances and viewpoint.Factors affecting costs:Tuition: The total cost of attending Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences (MCOPS) for a Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) degree is INR 8.28 lakh. A one-time admission fee of INR 10,000 and a hostel cost of INR 4.79 Lacs are also required. Extra fees: Take into account extra expenses such as study guides and test fees. These can accumulate to a considerable amount.When compared to other institutions, hostels are a little more expensive—they start from about INR 1.25 LPA. Even yet, the rooms are quite cozy, and students have the option of choosing an AC single room if they so choose. Thus, it depends on your  individual financial situation.
faqs.question: Is pursuing B.Pharma at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can apply for BPharm course of Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences with 60% in Class 12. The minimum eligibility requirement for the course admission is Class 12 or equivalent pass with Physics, Chemistry, and English with Biology/Mathematics as optional subjects from a recognised board. It is also essential that the aspirant have the educational certificate at the time of admission and form filling. These documents are required for verification purposes.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences for B.Pharma with 60% in Class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    Bachelor of Pharmacy (BPharm) programme is available at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences. A minimum of 10+2 (PCB/PCM/PCMB) is required for admission to the BPharm programme. College 2 bases admissions decisions on the results of the Manipal Entrance Test (MET).The Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences' official website states that a minimum of three attendances is needed in order to be qualified to take university exams.There are many different colleges but it is ranked 1st amomg private pharmacy institutions.And the college began by offering D.Pharm in 1963. MCOPS was the first college in Karnataka to offer M.Pharm in 1970. Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences is approved by AICTE and PCI. It is accredited by the NBA. MCOPS admission can be done online on the official website of the college. The college offers B.Pharm, PharmD, D.Pharm and M.Pharm programs. It also offers lateral entry programs in B.Pharm program. It is one of the leading Pharmaceutical institute in Karnataka. Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences aims to upgrade the infrastructure and facilities required for new courses and programs. The institute has nearly 2500+ faculty and almost 10000 other support and service staff, who cater to the various professional institutions in health sciences, engineering, management, communication, and humanities. Various scholarships are provided by Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences. The scholarships include merit-cum-means scholarship

overview_faqs.question: What is the course fees for four years BPharm in Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
overview_faqs.answer: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences BPharm tuition fee is INR 8.3 lakh, one-time fee is INR 10,000. In addition, the hostel charges are INR 4.79 lakh. The fee for the BPharm (lateral) course varies. The total tuition fee and hostel fee for the lateral programme is INR 8.35 lakh and INR 1.11 lakh, respectively. During registration, aspirants also have to pay registration fee of INR 600 to submit the application successfully. This fee amount is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences a good option?
overview_faqs.answer: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences (MCOPS) is a good option for you. MCOPS has a solid reputation for academic competence and routinely rates highly among pharmacy institutes in India. Professors with expertise and experience offer excellent instruction and mentoring. To accommodate a range of interests, it provides B.Pharm, M.Pharm, and Ph.D. programmes with different specialisations.In comparison to other cities, Manipal may have greater living and tuition costs. It might be challenging because admission is hard and the student body is intellectually motivated. The best place to find the most recent information is the MCOPS website.In addition, you might look into other universities that might be a better fit than MCOPS.

overview_faqs.question: Is Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences good for M.Pharma?
overview_faqs.answer: Many people believe that Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences (MCOPS) is a good option for M.Pharma students. MCOPS is well-known for its M.Pharma programmes and is frequently ranked as one of India's best pharmacy institutions.provides more than eleven M.Pharma specialisations, such as quality assurance, pharmaceutics, pharmacology, biotechnology, and pharmaceutical analysis.It has a strong emphasis on research and offers access to cutting-edge facilities as well as chances for cooperation, especially in specialised fields like medication development and discovery. Manipal can be more expensive than other places when it comes to living expenditures and tuition. Pressure may arise from the tough admissions process for M.Pharma programmes and the academically motivated student body.

admission_overview.college_name: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fees, Dates & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Science admissionsare merit or entrance-based. The college underMAHE Manipaloffers admission based on Manipal Entrance Test or MET.Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciencesoffer courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in the Pharmacy field. The courses offered are BPharm, MPharm, PharmD and DPharm.

MCOPS offers admission to courses based on entrance exam scores. The college considers merit in the qualifying exam for the DPharm programme. Below areManipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 or equivalent withPhysics, Chemistry,EnglishwithBiology/ Mathematics as optional subjects
Download:Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences UG Eligibility & Admission Process
Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences PG Eligibility & Admission Process
Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences Diploma Eligibility & Admission Process

Manipal College of Pharmaceutical course admission 2025is open. Applicants seeking admission fulfil both eligibility and selection requirements.MCOPS admission processis conducted in an online mode, candidates can apply on the official website of Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE). Below are the steps to get a seat in MCOPS:

Candidates willing to take admission to various courses at ManipalCollege of Pharmaceutical Sciencesmust submit an online application form along with a registration fee of INR 600. The institute will not accept any application with incomplete documents.

As part of the selection process, candidates must qualify for the college-level entrance exam basis the course-level eligibility set by the institute and Manipal University. The selection criteria for all the UG and PG courses is based on the MET entrance exam. The college considers the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam for DPharm programme.

MCOPS releases a merit list of selected candidates for final seat allotment. Selected aspirants need to participate in physical or online counselling. Further, candidates need to pay theMCOPS feeto confirm their seat in the college.

headings.text: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection
Steps for Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences Admission Process 2025

courses_data.name: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences B.Pharm Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences offers a four-year BPharm programme divided into eight semesters. To fulfill the eligibility criteria students must haveClass 12. The college also offers lateral entry to the BPharm programme. Applicants who want to takelateral entrymust have passed aDiploma in Pharmacyfrom an institution recognised by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI). Admission to the lateral entry course is based on merit scores obtained by the students in the past qualifying exam.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in B.Pharm at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences offers admission to BPharm course based on Manipal Entrance Test score. The college gives 50% weightage to entrance exam and 50% to score in Class 12. Selected candidates have to participate in physical/ online counselling. Shortlisted apsirants further need to complete the admission formalities for seat confirmation.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences for B.Pharma with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can apply for BPharm course of Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences with 60% in Class 12. The minimum eligibility requirement for the course admission is Class 12 or equivalent pass with Physics,Chemistry, and English withBiology/Mathematics as optional subjects from a recognised board. It is also essential that the aspirant have the educational certificate at the time of admission and form filling. These documents are required for verification purposes.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Pharm at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass Class 12 or equivalent with Physics, Chemistry, English with Biology/ Mathematics as optional subjects to apply for Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences BPharm programme. Besides, aspirants must also pass Manipal Entrance Test for admission to BPharm programme.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Pharm at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences BPharm programme ranges betweenINR 8.3 lakhandINR 9.1 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the college. Besides, aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 600 to register for the course.

courses_data.name: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences M.Pharm Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Manipal College of Pharmaceuticaloffers a two-year MPharm programme divided into four semesters. The college offers MPharm in various specialisations such asIndustrial Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Analysis,Pharmaceutical Biotechnology, Pharmaceutical Chemistry, etc. Candidates who have passed BPharm degree from a university recognised by the Pharmacy Council of India with at least 55% aggregate can apply for the MPharm programme.

faqs.question: Is MET score required for admission to M.Pharm at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences considers MET score for admission to MPharm programme. Manipal Entrance Test or MET is conducted by MAHE once in a year. Aspirants who are selected based on MET score are further called for physical or online counselling. Selected candidates need to complete the admission formalities for seat confirmation.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for M.Pharm at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass BPharm from a university recognised by the Pharmacy Council of India or PCI with a minimum of 55% aggregate to apply for Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences MPharm programme.Aspirants should have obtained registration with the State Pharmacy Council or should obtain the same within one month from the date of admission.

faqs.question: What M.Pharm specialisations are offered at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences offers two-year MPharm programme spread across four semesters. Candidates who hvave passed BPharm are eligible to apply for the MPharm course. Below are the MPharm specialisations offered at MCOPS:Industrial PharmacyPharmaceutical AnalysisPharmaceutical BiotechnologyPharmaceutical ChemistryPharmaceutical Quality AssurancePharmaceutical Regulatory AffairsPharmaceuticsPharmacognosyPharmacologyPharmacy Practice

courses_data.name: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences Pharm D Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences offers athree-year Pharm.Dprogramme.Admissionto PharmD is based on theManipal Entrance Test (MET). Candidates must pass BPharm with at least 55% aggregate from a university recognised by PCI to apply for PharmD programme of Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for Pharma.D at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass BPharm from a university recognized by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI), with a minimum of 55%aggregate or equivalent to apply for Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences PharmD programme. Aspirants should also have obtained registration with the State Pharmacy Council or the same within one month from the date of admission.

faqs.question: What is the fee of Pharm.D in MCOPS?
faqs.answer: The total fee ranges around approx.INR 6.2 Lakhto15.8 lakh. Applicantsmust make sure they pay the fee so they get the seat. Also, candidate need to pay an application fee of INR 600 to register for the course.Note:This data is taken from official website/ sanctioning body and can be changed.

faqs.question: Can I join Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences directly?
faqs.answer: No, Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences does not offer direct admission. Candidates have to first register for the preferred course on the official website of the college. Aspirants need to appear for Manipal Entrance Test or MET for BPharm, PharmD and MPharm programmes. The selection for DPharm is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Can I get into Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences with 70% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass a minimum of Class 12 to apply for Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences UG courses. The minimum aggregate to apply for UG programme is not specified by the college. However,  70% in Class 12 is a decent score and aspirants can apply with this score for UG admission. Besides, aspirants must also pass MET for admission to UG programme.

faqs.question: Are admissions to various courses open at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences admissions are open. Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for the preferred programme. The application fee is INR 600 for each programme. Admission to UG and PG courses at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences is based on Manipal Entrance Test or MET score.

faqs.question: Does Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences accept MET score?
faqs.answer: Yes, Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences considers MET score for admission to BPharm, PharmD and MPharm courses. Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) conducts Manipal Entrance Test (MET) once in a year in computer-based mode for two hours. Candidates who pass the MET are selected for admission to the college. Once selected, a provisional admission letter is sent to the aspirant.

placement_data.title: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences has not released its placement report 2023 yet. However, as per the NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during placements 2022 to BPharma and MPharma stood at INR 3 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 23 BPharma and 126 MPharma students were placed during Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences placements 2022.

faqs.question: How are B.Pharma placements at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences (MCOPS) has a 90% placement record for B.Pharm graduates. For B.Pharm students, the median package is approximately INR 6.00 LPA. MCOPS has a stellar placement record, placing over 95–100% of its students annually. Every year, prominent businesses that are looking for placements visit the campus, including Abbott, Eurofins Advinus, Alkem, Biocon, Bioclinica, Blueocean, Cipla, Danone, Dolcera, Dr. Reddy's, Decision Resources Group, Eris Life sciences, GSK, Hetero, Himalaya, Indegene, Lotus, Mylan, Nestle, Novo Nordisk, and Oaknet healthcare. The median package offered to BPharma and MPharma during placements in 2022 was INR 3 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively, according to the NIRF report 2023. Furthermore, during Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences placements 2022, a total of 23 BPharma and 126 MPharma students were placed.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in B.Pharma at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences offers numerous B.Pharm courses. Many students believe that their the greatest options are in the pharmacy branches, which include Anatomy, Pharmacology, Industrial Pharmacy, and Clinical Pharmacy. Students' hobbies and desired careers might guide their selection from a wide range of elective courses. Keep in mind that this is only a broad summary. Depending on programme modifications and the year of enrollment, the particular courses and their order may change slightly.Downloads of the B.Pharm programme brochures and course summaries are available on the MCOPS website. In case you have any special questions or need any clarifications regarding the B.Pharm curriculum, you can also get in contact with their team.

faqs.question: What is the salary package offered to Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences BPharm students?
faqs.answer: The college has not released its the latest placements report. However, its 2023 NIRF report is available. According to the report, the median package offered to BPharm students in the 2022 placements drive was INR 3 LPA . Moreover, out of 100 studnets, 23 were placed in the placements drive. MCOPS has established connections with prominent pharmaceutical companies, and the top recruiters are Biocon, Cipla, Abbott, Aurobindo Pharma, and Alkem.

The campus is equipped with all amenities. The college lab and other amenities are at par when compare to any university across India.

Hostel rooms range from the level of comfort you choose. They can be with or without ACs, single or double rooms, attached or common bathrooms, etc. Its your decision to make.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best pharmacy college in India.
reviews.review_text: We have a very good infrastructure with all the departments well maintained and with the best teachers you can get. Classrooms are well maintained, and laboratories are well-equipped with good and helping lab technicians. We have the biggest health sciences library in India. Here, you can get any kind of book whether it is an Indian or a foreign author. reviews.review_text:
There is a good Wi-Fi connection in our college with a password. Clean, hygienic and well-maintained labs and classrooms with air-conditioner. Labs are provided with enough good equipment. Even hostels are clean and hygienic. Hostels are also provided with a Wi-Fi connection. 
The food provided in the college canteen is delicious.

college_info.intro:
Dr. D.Y. Patil College of Physiotherapy offers courses at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels in the field of Physiotherapy. The popular programmes at DYPCP Pune include BPT and MPT. The Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) program is offered for a duration of 4.5 years and is structured into 8 semesters. In contrast, the Master of Physiotherapy (MPT) program spans 2 years and is divided into 4 semesters.
MPT is available in a number of specialisations that include Pediatrics, Sports Physiotherapy, Manual Therapy, Orthopedics, and Neurosciences, among others. Candidates can check the Dr. D. Y. Patil College of Physiotherapy popular programmes, along with the eligibility and fee details in the table below:

individual_reviews.title: Good campus, along with the regular facilities, but no placements or workshops are available.

content.Placements: 100 students are chosen as per the merit list. The internship is provided after 4 years for 6 months, making it a total course of 4.5 years. No placement cell or hospital is available. But foreign universities may come for the enquiry and orientation of master or Ph.D. programs from the college
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is amazing, along with a beautiful campus and a library available for every college. Facilities and crowds are good, and various extracurricular activities take place at the college during the festival season. Interested parties can participate. Sports week is celebrated along with an annual programme every year in the main auditorium.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2015

content.Other: This College is not up to the mark in in terms of quality of teaching. Lab Instructors do not teach well. Classes are not conducted as per schedule. Placement is fine and good companies visit the college. Placement preparation is also unsatisfactory. Has Hospital. Experienced staff, but have to study on your own. Has good Library and Canteen.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: My experience at the college has been good overall the campus is clean.

content.Placements: DDU college is on of the top college of Delhi University it offers quality education. Experienced faculty and good infrastructure the campus is clean and environment is student placement opportunity are decent specially for Science and Commerce streams. Overly a great place for Academy personal growth.
content.Infrastructure: I stand in this hostel for 2 year and overall it was good experience the rooms are clean and well maintained with daily housekeeping bathroom s are hygienic the food quality is average sometime it's tasty sometimes not the staff is helpful and the security is reliable Wi-Fi speed is a BEAT slow but manageable for studying.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good college, perfect study, and perfect environment.

content.Placements: Institute had released the list of students placed during the 2025 drive. A total of 109 students were placed. The highest package offered was INR 24 LPA, and the lowest package stood at INR 3.60 LPA. The leading recruiters of Dr. DY Patil Institute of Technology placements included Microsoft, Publicizes Sapient, Kickdrum, Barclays, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College had a well-equipped library with reference section, journal section, reading hall, digital library, and sick room. The library had a unique collection of encyclopedia, handbooks, reference books, textbooks, journals, and CDs. Hostel facilities included aquaguard purified drinking water, guest/visitors/parents waiting hall, TV/common waiting hall, 24 hour security and residence rectors available, and indoor games facilities. Sports complex and lab facilities were also provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Great faculty and good hand on .

content.Placements: Internship was provided to every single student ( unpaid internship) After completion of the course one can join a hospital as a physiotherapist or work at a clinic as an assistant physiotherapist and also set up their own clinic. The salary range from 12000-15000 a month to 35000-40000 a month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very well built and the classrooms have proper projectors and smart boards. Labs are well-equipped with all the advance equipments. Library is very well maintained and all the course curriculum books are available as well as access to various sits for journal and research work is also available. The hostel is inside the campus and the food quality was very good.

paragraphs: The admission process for Dr. D Y Patil College of Physiotherapy can be completed online. The process starts with the checking of the eligibility first. Eligible students can then apply online followed by selection and admission confirmation. Students can follow the steps below to complete theDr. D Y Patil College of Physiotherapy admission process:

Students can go to the official site of the Dr. D Y Patil College of Physiotherapy to start the online application. The form has to be filled with all the correct details and can be submitted with a processing fees + entrance test fees. Students can also go to the Dr. D Y Patil College of Physiotherapy admission office for offline process.

Students are shortlisted on an entrance basis only. Aspirants have to meet the basic eligibility of completing the last qualifying exam. Further, after entrance tests, students are called in for an online or offline counselling basis. During the counselling, seats are offered based on student's merit and preference. Shortlisted students who make it to the final merit list need to report for verification of documents. To complete the process, students need to pay theDr. D Y Patil College of Physiotherapy admission feesthrough the accepted payment gateway.

Dr. D Y Patil College of Physiotherapy fee structure may include tuition fees, library fees, lab fees, caution deposit, development fees, and more. Some of these are charged as one-time fees during admission, while the rest have to be paid either annually or semester-wise. The admission to BDS and MDS at MAIDS is strictly based on the score in NEET UG and NEET MDS, respectively.The admission process for Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences (MAIDS) is entrance-based. For the Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) program, admission is through counseling based on the rank obtained in NEET UG. MAIDS offers a five-year undergraduate BDS program and MDS under nine specializations. 50% of the PG seats are filled on an all-India basis through NEET.
faqs.question: Does Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences accept NEET score?

faqs.answer: A:    Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences (MAIDS) accepts NEET MDS scores for admission to its Master of Dental Surgery (MDS) program. individual_reviews.title: Review of Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences, MAMC.

content.Placements: There are 50 students in our batch who got their admission through the NEET exam. Around 50% of seats are reserved for post-graduation. It is the best dental college in India.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are fully air-conditioned. Projectors are also available in our classrooms. It provides a library, and several newly published books, magazines, and articles are available. The hostel is good and safe. Hostel location is nearby our campus.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are very helpful and humble. They are highly educated. Semester examinations are good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best dental college in Asia.

content.Placements: Around 40 students are placed and offered a package of 1 LPA, and Deal Kart recruits students and can become principal. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA, and it's a very good and handy package. Around 90% of students get good placements in very good companies and hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: A very large building with all facilities there is a centralized Wi-Fi system, there is a library and e-library are available. There is a cafeteria and there is a good and large playground to play cricket and football. All medical facilities are available and a canteen is also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: One of the best dental college and hospital - MAIDS.

content.Placements: Out of 32 students of 2012 batch, 11 were selected for PG. The salary offered is Rs. 92,000 per month. The rest few have opened clinics and have an average salary of Rs. 50,000 per month. Few of them are preparing for NEET MS 2019. This is the best dental hospital in the country, so the reputation is good. There is junior internship of 10-12 seats for the period of the 1st year offer which is not reserved for only MAIDS, in fact, all India level.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi facility provided. There are labs for making denture appliances. Histology classes and sports ground of MAMC are available. The quality of the lab is one of the best among Indian dental colleges. The hostel rooms are quite good which are offered from MAMC and canteens are open 24 hours.

admission_process.title: Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences admissionsare entrance-based. The institute accepts national-level entrance examsNEETandNEET MDSfor UG and PG admissions, respectively. MAIDS Delhi offers BDS and MDS at UG and PG levels in the Dental field in affiliation withDelhi University. Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the Faculty of Medical Sciences, DU for BDS and MDS admission.

Admission to MAIDS Delhi courses is throughNEETandNEET MDSscores. Candidates are required to take admission through the Faculty of Medical Sciences, DU. Find belowMaulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences fees vary for UG and PG courses. The fee might include multiple components such as caution deposit, tuition fee, exam fee, registration, etc. Some of the components are one-time paid while others are paid annually or semester-wise. Find belowMAIDS Delhi feesfor BDS and MDS courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

MAIDS Delhi seat intake is defined by the institute for UG and PG admission. Out of the total intake, seats are offered under All India Quota and DU Quota. Check below the Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences seat intake and reservation criteria:
15% of UG total seats on All India Quota
85% of total UG seats are filled on a merit basis in NEET through Delhi University as State Quota

Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences admission processincludes multiple steps. Candidates need to register for BDS or MDS course at Faculty of Medical Sciences, DU. Find below step-wise MAIDS Delhi admission process:

Candidates after qualifying NEET or NEET MDS have to register for the respective counselling for both 50% DU Quota and 50% All India Quota. Once, students are allotted seat by MCC, they need to register on the official website of Faculty of Medical Sciences, DU. Below is the application fee for BDS and MDS programmes:
For all other categories: INR 1,000 per course

Faculty of Medical Sciences, DU releases a merit list based on the rank secured by the aspirants. The institute acceptsNEET-UGscore for BDS andNEET MDSscore for MDS programme. The admission would be made strictly based on merit of the eligible candidates in each category, determined by marks obtained in the NEET or NEET MDS score.

Selected candidates are further called for counselling. Candidates are required to select MAIDS BDS or MDS during counselling to get a seat in the institute. Aspirants who have been allotted a seat receive an admission letter. They need to pay a programme fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

According to Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during BDS placements 2023 stood at INR 12 LPA . Further, 12 students were placed out of 32 students during Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences BDS placements 2023. Other than this, the median package offered during MDS / MD placements 2023 stood at INR 17.68 LPA whereas the placement rate recorded for PG 2-year programs was 100%.

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing BDS at Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: Yes, BDS graduates of Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences are eligible for various jobs in the government sector. Some of these jobs are listed below: Dental Surgeon positions in Government Hospitals, Community Health Centers (CHCs), and Primary Health Centers (PHCs) Army Dental Corps (Indian Army) Dental Surgeon positions under the Central Government Health Scheme (CGHS) or the National Rural Health Mission (NRHM) Dental Surgeons in the Indian Railways Lecturership and Academics in Government Dental Colleges Public Health Dentistry and Dental Officers in Government Programmes

description: Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the BDS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 27386 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences BDS cutoff 2025 was 27386 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 27641 for admission to the BDS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for BDS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the BDS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences, MAMC latest cutoff trends:

Students can check the table below to know the cutoff details for other categories, specialisations, rounds, etc.

highlights.description: Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #3 in the Dental category by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences rankings:

rankings.highlight: 2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Delhi In 2025

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Dental' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences's rank is #3, the same as last year's rank in the 'Dental' category by the NIRF ranking.

data: Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences, MAMC.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are fully air-conditioned. Projectors are also available in our classrooms. It provides a library, and several newly published books, magazines, and articles are available. The hostel is good and safe. Hostel location is nearby our campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best dental college in Asia.
reviews.review_text: A very large building with all facilities there is a centralized Wi-Fi system, there is a library and e-library are available. There is a cafeteria and there is a good and large playground to play cricket and football. All medical facilities are available and a canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to learn to become a good doctor. Faculty give their best to make you the best.
reviews.review_text: It has an average infrastructure. It has a limited number of dental chairs. The auditorium and lounges are better. The hostel facility is average, especially the boys' hostel. Girl's hostels are good, and they are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best dental education and has good placements and the best infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It has a good infrastructure. We have an E-library, and there are various labs on all floors. We have 2 buildings providing comprehensive care to patients and they are treated by highly qualified professionals. Our E-library along with a library contains books providing every knowledge of all the subjects.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best dental college and hospital - MAIDS.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility provided. There are labs for making denture appliances. Histology classes and sports ground of MAMC are available. The quality of the lab is one of the best among Indian dental colleges. The hostel rooms are quite good which are offered from MAMC and canteens are open 24 hours.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome faculty with good placements but bad infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. But there is a very big library with all kind of medical books. The playground is good, but we cant play all kinds of sports and games. The pathology lab is awesome but needs a lot of maintenance. The hostel facility is good, but the canteen and the mess are not good. There are many other infrastructure related issues.

reviews.review_heading: MS from the Maulana Azad institute of dental Science.
reviews.review_text: Our college was having really good infrastructure for the MS course. All the kinds of necessary facilities were available at the college campus for the students. Their were proper labs for the students hands on practice. Canteen, Wi-Fi, library etc. Were also available for the students. Hostel facilities were also of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is perfect except few hostels.
reviews.review_text: Wifi is not available for students. However ,proper pre clinical prosthodontic, orthodontic  , haematology ,OP and other labs are there. There are separate lecture halls which are well conditioned and spacious. A separate library is there which stays open during college hours and also offers a variety of books along with research journals. There is a common hostel for both BDS and MBBS students. However,to be honest various forms of discrimination is being practiced against BDS students for prov...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best dental government college in Delhi.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a well-managed library. The infrastructure in our college is kind of average as it is one the oldest and reputed institutions in the country. Everything available here is good, including mess, sports, medical support, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Placement chances, good infrastructures.
reviews.review_text: The college has a large classroom. About 250 students can situate them. The library is good and contains all medical books. Not just medical book also contains journal books. We have our own sports ground outside MAMC, there we play any outdoor game like football, basketball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is the number one college in India for the available courses.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure facilities were better. The college was situated in Delhi. We had better Wi-Fi connections with a good level AT laboratory. There were better instruments and buildings in the college. The campus was huge and beautiful with a garden. Many play stations and playgrounds like basketball, cricket, tennis, and football were available.

highlights.summary: YBN University admissions 2026 are open for Diploma, UG, and PG courses. Interested aspirants can check and apply for their desired courses through the official website of the university. A few more updates are as follows:

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at YBN University Ranchi include MBA, BTech, BSc, and others. The university offers a list of UG and PG courses across various specialisations. Some of the popular BTech specialisations offered at the university are listed below:
Candidates can check some of the popular programmes offered at YBN University along with the eligibility selection criteria, and the fees details in the following table:

placements.overview: YBN University admission 2025 is open. the university offers various courses at UG, PG, and PhD programmes through 14 schools of study. YBN Ranchi admission is based on merit and entrance exams. The university accepts national entrance exams such as CUET, NEET, and others. Aspiring candidates meet the eligibility criteria set by the university for the desired course and apply online on the university’s official website. Below are the important dates regarding YBN University admissions for 2025:

faqs.answer: A:    The average package offered during the recent YBN University Ranchi placement was INR 4 LPA. The same is tabulated below:ParticularsPlacement StatisticsAverage packageINR 4 LPANote: The average package mentioned above has been taken from students’ reviews on the Shiksha page.
faqs.question: What is the average package offered at YBN University?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the students’ reviews on Shiksha page, various recruiters visited every year at YBN University and placed students in new-age job roles. The top recruiters of who participated during the recent YBN University placements include Axis Bank, Cadila Pharmaceuticals, BBC News, HDFC Bank, etc.
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of YBN University?

faqs.answer: A:    The BSc placements at YBN University are generally good. Over 60% of BSc students got placed in various companies in the 2022-2023 placement season. The highest package offered was 12 LPA, and the average package offered was 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters included Axis Bank, Cadila Pharmaceuticals, BBC News, and HDFC Bank.
faqs.question: How are BSc placements at YBN University?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the external sources, YBN University alumni are placed in top national and multinational companies such as Microsoft, Google, Amazon, EY, KPMG, etc. They work in various sectors such as Engineering, Operations, Business Development, Marketing, Sales and more. They are majorly involved in the Operations sector, followed by the Engineering and Sales sector.
faqs.question: Where do YBN University alumni work?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: YBN University offers UG, PG, and PhD programmes across various streams such as Engineering, , Medical, , Pharmacy, and others. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, , BPharma, , BPT, BSc, , and other programmes. At the PG level, the university offers MBA,, MSc, MPT, and other courses to the students. Aspiring candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the university for the desired course. Below mentioned are YBN University courses and YBN University fees:

faqs.answer: A:    YBN University BSc tuition fee ranges from INR 60,000 to INR 7.6 lakh. The hostel fee ranges from INR 48,000 to INR 60,000, while the one-time fee ranges from INR 3,600 to INR 9,100. Candidates who get finalised for admission have to pay the admission fee as prescribed by the university. The mentioned fee amount is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to revision and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at YBN University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can if you have a very good score in your graduation (88%). It get appreciated,  as the eligibility criteria for YBN university in MBA is the candidate must score 55% aggregate marks in their Bachelor's, and the selection criteria is merit-based. They are also offering the various specializations in MBA  such asFinanceMarketingHR ITLogistics & Supply Chain Management
faqs.question: Can I get YBN University, MBA with 88% in graduation?

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Choose this college for degree purpose only .

review_content.Placements: Please visit only if you want the Certificate and are interested in not attending the college. A Bachelor of Pharmacy is also offered but there is no placement in any of the courses. This college can only provide seminars, conferences, webinars, useless cultural activities and meetings. The lab facility is good .
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are getting better day to day. Wi-Fi and a library are available but the college is in a very remote area, due to which you can face problems. You have to walk for 5 to 6 km every day if you attend regular classes. Bus facilities are available but the whole day gets wasted as bus timing is very poor. 9 AM to 5 PM is the timing of the college .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of YBN University.

review_content.Placements: Students who score above 70% got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Wipro, etc. Students who scored above 70% got internships. Top roles offered are BDA, customer care, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are well-maintained and equipped with huge boards. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. The library is average. They provide Wi-Fi facilities in labs, so you could have a better experience and understanding. Our college provides sports facilities.

faqs.answer: YBN University accepts admission through both CUET and its own entrance test, YBN University Entrance Test (YBNUET). YBN University conducts its own entrance exam to select candidates for Ph.D. admission. Candidates must have received a passing grade in the relevant subject in Class 12 from an approved board in order to be considered for admission to any undergraduate programme at YBN University.
faqs.question: Q: What is the entrance exam for YBN University?

faqs.answer: YBN University BSc registrations may open around May/ Jun. Candidates seeking admission must register and apply on or before the prescribed deadline. The admission office of the university can also be contacted for updates related to the form release and course admission.
faqs.question: Q: Are admissions open for BSc in YBN University?

faqs.answer: Yes, YBN University offers BSc programmes in different course specialisations. Some of the available course specialisations are Nursing, Post Basic Nursing, Agriculture, Optometry, etc. Candidates who are Class 12 or equivalent examination pass with required aggregate the subject combination can apply. The eligible students can go to the official website to register and apply.
faqs.question: Q: Is there BSc available at YBN University?

faqs.answer: YBN University BSc admission cycle commences with the form release and application submission. Aspirants who fulfil the course-specific eligibility requirements can apply. The selection for course admission is done either on a merit-basis or as per performance in the accepted examinations. YBNU may accept scores of CUET, or applicable national/ state/ university level examinations. Once the selection procedure is completed, the aspirants can pay the admission fee amount to lock their seats.
faqs.question: Q: What is the admission process for BSc in YBN University?
