individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Affordable practical electrical engineering diploma with supportive faculty.

content.Placements: Placement rate approximately 70-80% of students secured placements through campus recruitment drives. The highest package is about 12 LPA and the average package is about 4 LPA. Over 50 companies participated in the placement process. Students from many fields with various fields are selected.
content.Infrastructure: YBN University Ranchi offers a comprehensive environment for students. Classrooms equipped with air conditioning and modern audio-visual tools like LCD projectors facilitate interactive learning classes. Labs state-of-the-art labs with advanced pieces of equipment. Sports is also good and engaging.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with faculty and fee.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities are limited because only small-scale hospitals and industries come to campus. The university does provide on-campus selection for freshers to gain experience, but it is not the type of university where we are guaranteed a placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at this university is good and is still under construction. There are different types of areas for different sectors. The hostel is good, and the price is affordable. Although we may have concerns about the infrastructure at the moment, but in two or three years this university will have great infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Choose this college for degree purpose only .

content.Placements: Please visit only if you want the Certificate and are interested in not attending the college. A Bachelor of Pharmacy is also offered but there is no placement in any of the courses. This college can only provide seminars, conferences, webinars, useless cultural activities and meetings. The lab facility is good .
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are getting better day to day. Wi-Fi and a library are available but the college is in a very remote area, due to which you can face problems. You have to walk for 5 to 6 km every day if you attend regular classes. Bus facilities are available but the whole day gets wasted as bus timing is very poor. 9 AM to 5 PM is the timing of the college .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of YBN University.

content.Placements: Students who score above 70% got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Wipro, etc. Students who scored above 70% got internships. Top roles offered are BDA, customer care, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are well-maintained and equipped with huge boards. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. The library is average. They provide Wi-Fi facilities in labs, so you could have a better experience and understanding. Our college provides sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: College supports you in every possible manner

content.Placements: Around 80 percent of students get placement easily. The highest package was around 5 lakh and the lowest was about 2 lakhs. Around 60 percent of students got internship. College supports you in every possible manner and guides you towards your future.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available within college premises and the speed of Wi-Fi is also fine. Labs, classrooms and library are regularly cleaned and maintained. The quality of food at the college is also fine and they prepare different food at different days and special food on special occasions.

admission_overview.college_name: YBN University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: YBN University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts entrance exam for courses such as MBA, BBA, PhD, etc.YBN University Ranchioffers98 UG, PG, diploma and PhD programmessuch as BHMS, BSc, B.Ed, BTech, Diploma in Engineering, Diploma in Journalism, MSc Information Technology, MBA, MPH, etc. across18 schools, namely School of Legal Studies, School of Medical Sciences, School of Nursing, School of Education, among others.

YBN University Ranchi offers multiple programmes under various disciplines, namely Science, Engineering and Technology, Law, Journalism and Mass Communication, Computer Science and Information Technology, Arts and Humanities, etc. The duration of these programmes varies from course to course. Below are popularYBN University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

YBN University admission process includes multiple steps. Candidates are first required to register for the preferred programme followed by participating in the selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat in YBN University:

The mode of application is online. Candidates need to apply with the basic details to generate login credentials. Additionally, candidates need to login and fill out the application form for the preferred course. Aspirants need to upload a photograph as a document in the application form.

YBN University selects candidates for most of the UG and PG courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university accepts CAT, XAT and other Management entrance exams for MBA admission. YBN also conducts an entrance test for BBA programme.
Once the selection process is over, aspirants need to confirm their admission by paying the course fee.

hostel_campus.college_name: YBN University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Infrastructure: The campus might have well-designed buildings, academic blocks, administrative offices, libraries, laboratories, and research centers.
Green Spaces: Universities often have green and landscaped areas, gardens, and open spaces where students can relax and study.
Hostel Facilities: For outstation students, the campus could offer hostel accommodations with basic amenities.
Cafeteria and Dining Facilities: There might be canteens or cafeterias that provide food options for students and staff.
Sports and Recreational Facilities: Universities often have sports grounds, indoor sports complexes, gyms, and other facilities to promote physical fitness and extracurricular activities.
Auditoriums and Seminar Halls: Spaces for organizing academic events, seminars, conferences, and cultural programs.
Technology and Connectivity: Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the campus to facilitate access to online resources.
Medical Facilities: Some universities may have medical centres or tie-ups with nearby hospitals to provide medical assistance to students and staff.
Student Activity Centers: Places where students can engage in various clubs, societies, and extracurricular activities.
Security Measures: Universities often have security arrangements to ensure the safety of students and the campus.

college_info.college_name: YBN University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: YBN University offers scholarships to meritorious students and students from economically weaker sections of society and others. YBN University scholarship applies to all the students who are admitted to the UG and PG programmes of a particular academic year. Scholarships are awarded to a candidate based on their performance in any of the following categories:
Merit Scholarship: Scholarships are awarded to candidates based on their performance on the national entrance exam or toppers of the centre and state boards.
Financial Aid: Scholarships are awarded to candidates based on need-based, orphan applicants, persons with certain disability, and defence and central armed police forces.

faqs.answer: A:    MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Aurangabad admissions are ongoing for all courses on its official website the last date to apply is Aug 31, 2025. The university offers merit and entrance-based admission to all UG and PG courses. Candidates searching for admission to MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Aurangabad are required to fill out the online application form. Candidates can fill out the admission form by visiting the official website of college.
faqs.question: Can I apply for admission to MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Aurangabad?

faqs.answer: A:    MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Aurangabad, offers merit and entrance- based admission to all the courses. The offers admission based on the last-qualifying exam for admission to any UG and PG courses. Additionaly, college may also accept MGMCET entrance exam, followed by PI round. Further, to be eligible for courses, candidates must have passed Class 10 and Class 12 with Science with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised board for UG courses and a graduation degree for PG courses.
faqs.question: Can I join MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Aurangabad directly?

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing BSc at MGM School of Biomedical Sciences?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth pursuing BSc at MGM School of Biomedical Sciences as it is a prestigious college and was established in 2007. The college is recognised by the UGC and has been accredited by NAAC with an A+ grade. MGM School of Biomedical Sciences Aurangabad is a renowned educational college and offers courses at UG and PG levels. The college offers a BSc programme to students for 4 years across several specialisations such as Perfusion Technology, Medical Radiology & Imaging Technology, Cardiac Care Technology, etc. MGM School of Biomedical Sciences also provides placement assistance to students in top-notch companies including Lenskart.

overview_faqs.question: Is MGM School of Biomedical Sciences a good choice for an average student?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, MGM School of Biomedical Sciences is a good choice for an average student as it is a renowned educational college and offers courses at UG and PG levels. The college was established under the Mahatma Gandhi Mission (MGM) Trust, established in 1982, and has various campuses in Nanded, Aurangabad, Navi Mumbai, Noida (Uttar Pradesh), etc. It is mainly concerned with streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences and Science. Apart from this, MGMSBS Maharashtra has collaborated with several colleges such as Maulana Azad College Chh. Sambhajinagar, Deogiri College Chh. Sambhajinagar, MGM University- Institute of Biosciences & technology, etc.

individual_reviews.title: Really good college, the campus is just epic, and the placement is also good.

content.Placements: Most of the students in the course were placed in different hospitals. The average starting package offered to the freshers was 20000. There is an internship already added to the course, which is in the last year of the college, i.e., in the 7th and 8th semesters.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available at the college are top-notch. There are nearly all the facilities available in the college, like a very big library, computer rooms discussion rooms and free Wi-Fi. The quality of the food in the canteen is not that good as compared to other colleges but it is still edible.

paragraphs: The 2024 MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Aurangabad placements concluded with 85% B.Optometry, 80% BSc Cardiac Care Technology, 73% BSc Medical Radiology Imaging Technology, and 65% BSc Operation Theater & Anesthesia Technology students placed . For courses like BSc Perfusion Technology, BSc Medical Dialysis Technology, and BSc Medical Laboratory Technology, the placement percentage stood at 60%.

The overall highest package recorded during the 2024 placements was INR 8 LPA , and the lowest package stood at INR 3 LPA . The total number of BSc and BOPTM students placed during MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Aurangabad placements 2024 was 93 .

admission_overview.college_name: Karnataka College of Pharmacy Admission 2025: Courses, Application, Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: Karnataka College of Pharmacy Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Karnataka College of Pharmacy admission 2025 is primarily entrance-based. The college offers courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels in the field of Pharmacy. The college offers BPharm at UG, MPharm at PG, and DPharm at diploma levels. Karnataka College of Pharmacy accepts students based on the scores secured by them in either national or state-level entrance exams, such as KCET, followed by COMEDK counselling for seat allotment. The application process for the college mainly commences online. Interested students can go through the following article to learn all about the admission process and criteria for Karnataka College of Pharmacy.

eligibility_selection.title: Karnataka College of Pharmacy Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Karnataka College of Pharmacy course admission is subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Students need to meet both the basic eligibility along with clearing the selection rounds to get a seat at the college. The college accepts students mostly on an entrance basis. Some of the exams accepted by the college include KCET and PGCET. The college follows the norms of the Karnataka Examinations Authority (KEA) for seat allotment to its pharmacy courses. Karnataka College of Pharmacy UG admission requires students to pass Class 12 or equivalent with PCB from a recognised board

review_summary.college_name: PP Savani University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, a balanced campus, and placements at PPSU.

content.Placements: Placements at P. P. Savani University are average right now but are improving, especially for Computer Science and AI & ML. Around 60 percent of students get placed every year. The highest package is about 9 LPA, the average is 3.5 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and growing startups.
content.Infrastructure: It has a clean, green campus with a lake view, modern classrooms, good computer labs, and a large library. The Wi-Fi may be stuck sometimes. Hostels are secure and well-maintained with 24/7 water and electricity. Mess food is average but hygienic, and the canteen is affordable for students. Non-vegetarian food is strictly prohibited.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering (AI and ML) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: In our college, there is an internship fair in 7th semester. Students will apply for that and get a 100% offer to do an internship, and in that 70-80% students get paid internships. There are a lot of companies like Reliance, Narola Infotech, Vasundhara Infotech, Aqua Paints, TCS, and many others.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi speed is good for doing anything about our studies. Labs are top-notch, all PCs are in working condition. Library is well managed and has books on any course, which means all the books are there to use, no need to purchase because college will provide two books per ID card. In library, there are PCs also so those who not have the system or laptop to do a practical so they can use that PCs. I am doing up and down from home so I don't know about the college but food is good.

admission_overview.title: PP Savani University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: PP Savani University admissions are open. The university offers UG, PG, and doctoral programmes through its schools. The university also has collaborations with universities, companies, and organisations in and out of India. It offers courses in Engineering, Sciences, Design, Architecture, Management, Physiotherapy, Liberal Arts, Nursing, and Medical Sciences. The mode of application is online. PP Savani University gives admissions on both merit and entrance basis depending on programme. PP Savani also offers various industry-based collaborative programmes under the umbrella of PPSU NIC for the skill enhancement of students as follows:

eligibility_selection.title: PP Savani University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: PPSU course admissions are subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. The basic eligibility for admission at PPSU is merit in the last qualifying examination. UG admissions are granted on basis the of Class 12 merit, whereas a bachelor's degree is considered for PG admissions. PhD candidates must have a master's degree in a relevant discipline. Admission to most of the courses at the university is merit-based. The table below lists the eligibility and selection criteria related to PP Savani University courses:

paragraphs: The admission process for PPSU starts with an eligibility check. Other stages include application, appearing in the selection rounds, offline admission process, and verification of documents. The steps forPP Savani University admission processare as given below:

The first step in the admission process is to fill the application/ registration form. Students can visit the official website to apply for the interested course and after the completion of the form, the last step is to pay the application fee and proceed for submission.

Candidates who have fulfilled the desired criteria will be considered for admission. The selected students are required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats with respective time/ deadlines. They will be provided with the enrollment number as a confirmation of Admission.
Document Submission & Payment of Admission Fees

Selected students have to submit the prescribedPPSU feesfor the respective course. Following this, students are required to go through the verification of documents and are intimated about the date of commencement of the classes.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by PP Savani University?
faqs.answer: PP Savani University accepts various entrance exam scores for admission to its management programs. The accepted entrance exam scores include CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, and AJU Combined Entrance Exam scores. For the B.Arch program, the university accepts NATA scores. For the Ph.D program, candidates with valid scores in NET(JRF)/SLET/MPhil are not required to appear for the Ph.D Entrance Test, but they must meet the cutoff scores. Final admission to the Ph.D program is based on the presentation and interaction during the university-level counseling process.

faqs.question: Does PP Savani University accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: Yes, PP Savani University accepts JEE scores for admission to its B.Tech Mechanical Engineering program. The overall cutoff for JEE-Main is 16807 - 25016 rank. However, the university primarily accepts GUJCET scores for admission to its B.Tech program. For admission to other programs, PP Savani University accepts scores obtained in NEET for its medical programs and conducts a Ph.D Entrance Test for admission to its Ph.D program.

faqs.question: Can I join BSc at PP Savani University without 80% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: PP Savani University has specified an aggregate of 45% for BSc admissions. Candidates must have completed Class 12 or equivalent to be eligible to apply for UG courses. Candidates with 80% in Class 12 typically have a decent chance of securing admission. In addition to this, candidates are required to keep all the required documents ready to secure admission at the institute.

placement_data.title: PP Savani University Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: PP Savani University has released the placement details for the Class of 2026. The students of School of Liberal Arts & Management Studies ( SLM ) batch 2026 achieved 92% placements with the highest salary of INR 8 LPA . The SOE batch 2026 recorded 94% success rate with the highest package of INR 7.5 LPA. The overall highest package offered during PP Savani University placements 2026 stood at INR 78 LPA . This package was secured by BPT students. The highest salary achieved by BSc IT batch 2026 was INR 20 LPA. The top recruiters of PP Savani University in recent past include Alembic Pharmaceuticals, AMI Organics, Aditya Birla Capital, Lenskart, Tech Mahindra, Tata AIG, Zydus Life Sciences , etc.

hostel.description: The University provides separate hostels for Boys and Girls with 3 occupancy sharing in each room. AC and Non- AC rooms are available in the hostel with all the basic facilities like a medical facility, fitness center and gym with the latest types of equipment, and indoor and outdoor games for the students.

library.description: The library is well equipped with the latest textbooks and journals. DELNET online facility is available to the students can able to utilize more than 15 journals. Each student will get books/journals from the library for the specific period.

facilities: Maternal and Child Health Nursing Lab

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, a balanced campus, and placements at PPSU.
reviews.review_text: It has a clean, green campus with a lake view, modern classrooms, good computer labs, and a large library. The Wi-Fi may be stuck sometimes. Hostels are secure and well-maintained with 24/7 water and electricity. Mess food is average but hygienic, and the canteen is affordable for students. Non-vegetarian food is strictly prohibited.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed is good for doing anything about our studies. Labs are top-notch, all PCs are in working condition. Library is well managed and has books on any course, which means all the books are there to use, no need to purchase because college will provide two books per ID card. In library, there are PCs also so those who not have the system or laptop to do a practical so they can use that PCs. I am doing up and down from home so I don't know about the college but food is good.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good in terms of events and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides central air conditioning, SMART TVs, Wi-Fi in every classroom, and library access for all students with just an ID card. In the hostel, they provide C and non-C rooms separately. There is a ground for sports, a GYM facility, payable washing machines for clothes, and tight security at night.

reviews.review_heading: Best value for money college.
reviews.review_text: My college has nicely equipped modern infrastructure. My college covers over 100 acres of land area, providing various facilities like canteen, gym garden, play area, turf, etc. Well-equipped classrooms with Wi-Fi and AC. In the hostel, there is a facility for water and electricity with proper maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with facilities and opportunities provided by the college administration.
reviews.review_text: Highly satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, spacious library, canteen, sports arena, separate hostels for both boys and girls, and 24/7 medical facilities. The food provided in the canteen is pure vegetarian and is of top-notch quality.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. In every classroom, we have smart systems, AC, good chairs, and desks. The quality of the food in the canteen is nice. Many sports activities are conducted here and we can play them anytime we want like football, cricket, basketball, volleyball, etc. In the library, we have a group desk as well as an individual one with many types of books.

reviews.review_heading: PPSU blends quality education, top placements, and great facilities, offering growth opportunities.
reviews.review_text: At PPSU, we have a good Wi-Fi connection where we can easily do our research projects and use e-books. We have classrooms with all modern technology, such as interactive smart boards and audio-visual aids, to create an engaging student environment. At the library, we have all books required as per our lesson plan. We have girls' and boys' hostel separately. We have a basketball ground, football ground, badminton, music room, and also a yoga room for meditation.

reviews.review_heading: College has good faculty, bad management, too much hidden files, big and enjoyable campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice and good. Wi-Fi is available 24X7. Library is pleasant with a wide variety of literature. Hostel is well-maintained and good. Canteen is good and has a variety of food options with good quality food and stuff. Sport activities are in quite a range.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at P. P. Savani University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of PP SAVANI UNIVERSITY is very much big and advanced. There are many buildings and each building runs a different discipline. Wi-Fi is available in almost every single classroom also computer, Physics chemical and other laboratories are also there. University also has a library which has lots of books available.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities given by the university are beneficial for us like hospital, canteen, etc.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of P. P. Savani University is very good. Classrooms,labs, auditorium, etc, are available. The best part of the college is campus. Campus is quite big. Hostels are also very reasonable and affordable for all. They have 4 types of hostel dormitory, 3-seater, 4-seater, and 5-seater rooms. There are chairs, salons, and many more facilities available for hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: Functional MOUs with top-notch industries.
reviews.review_text: The course infrastructure is very smooth with well-equipped laboratories with hands-on experience in practical and research, fostering a strong foundation for students. The Wi-Fi facility is 24/7 with computer labs for bioinformatics and other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure, Good canteen facilities, great assistance for competitive exams.
reviews.review_text: Excellent lab facilities for research with expensive instruments. Free Wi-fi access across the entire college campus. We have basketball, volleyball, and badminton courts on our campus. A musical complex, a Gym, and cafe facilities at very low prices for the students. The classrooms are comfortable with AC. The library is open from 8 am to 10 pm. Medical facilities are available. Overall the college canteen food is good. For hostel facilities, it's up to you which type of room you want AC/non-AC...

reviews.review_heading: Educational environment and Positive Campus.
reviews.review_text: 24/7 Wi-Fi is available. There is a library where all books for respective courses are available, and there is a hospital on campus. There are separate labs for each department. The college also has a student startup program that is held every month, where ideas are listened to by judges, and funding is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Perfect college for the BPT course. It offers excellent posting opportunities every year.
reviews.review_text: AC classrooms are available. Computer labs are offered. Wi-Fi with high end-to-end encryption is given by the college. The library is also equipped with the latest edition of books in every course. All the latest medical facilities are provided for the best medical assistance.

reviews.review_heading: There is good infrastructure and hospitality on our campus.
reviews.review_text: All excellent facilities are provided. The campus is filled with an excellent vibe of studying and enrichment. There is good air conditioning and ventilation in the classroom. The library has all books needed for our course. Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus and they work for our usage.

college_info.college_name: Christian Medical College Vellore, Chittoor Campus: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Christian Medical College Vellore, Chittoor Campus, is located in Chittoor, Andhra Pradesh. It is an institute approved by INC. Christian Medical College Vellore, Chittoor Campus provides 9 UG courses in 5 specialisations, namely Anaesthesia Technology, Medical Laboratory Technology, Medical Record Technology, Occupational Therapy and Optometry. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.Sc., UG Diploma, B.O.Th and BPT are some of the courses offered at Christian Medical College Vellore, Chittoor Campus. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Medicine & Health Sciences and Nursing. The total fee at Christian Medical College Vellore, Chittoor Campus ranges between INR 200 to 3,240. Christian Medical College Vellore, Chittoor Campus has a student intake of 91 for all the courses. Christian Medical College Vellore, Chittoor Campus offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and proper knowledge were given to the students.

review_content.Placements: In the nursing course, all the students were getting placement opportunities. Around 60–70% of the students get successfully placed. The average package offered in the course was between 3-5 LPA. Around 100% of the students get internships at our college. Students get recruited at the private hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: CMC Vellore has a well-maintained and developed infrastructure. The college had good-quality facilities. All the necessary facilities were available in the labs of the college for the medical students. A library and multiple sports facilities were also provided to the students. The hostel facilities were of good quality.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Take admission and enjoy life.

review_content.Placements: The placement department is good here. They provide a lot of placement. Placement department easily provides a medical hospital for paid training. They easily provide jobs. This college has a lot of alumni who are always ready to help us.
review_content.Infrastructure: As I am from Village so I did not have a laptop. The college helped me to get scholarship and a laptop to learn to code. I am learning very much. There is an amazing library in this beautiful campus as the facilities are so good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Records Science - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Completely satisfied with awesome faculty, good placements, and wonderful infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 100% of placements are available in hospitals like Manipal, Apollo etc. Packages start from 20,000 to 50,000 per month within the country and 1 lakh to 2-3 Lacs per month abroad for roles of medical record officers, medical coders, manager etc. Overall, it was wonderful.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has libraries for good projects and study references. We have overall development through OP and IP training schedules each day. Different department classes are scheduled for thorough knowledge. It has an excellent hostel and healthy food in the mess and canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Yes. Come here for better opportunities.

review_content.Placements: The placement department is too good; they will be supporting you a lot and giving you lots of opportunities. And they will be allotting a medical college for training and after training, you will get a job easily in the best hospital in India, like AIIMS, Apollo, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my campus is so beautiful You have canteen at every 100 meters, a coffee shop and washrooms available in every area of 100 meters. They provide lots of facilities The environment is completely competitive and full of learning.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is the greatest institute to be in.

review_content.Placements: Students have to sign a two-year bond with the college that it provides placements for students in the same hospital where they practiced. This is a great opportunity for students to learn better and develop their skills and gain experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: Currently, the campus is under construction, but still, the management takes utmost care in satisfying the needs of students and provides them a healthy environment. This is one of the best campuses that students would have.

college_info.college_name: Sri Aurobindo Institute of Medical Science: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Sri Aurobindo Institute of Medical Science:

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely awesome college.

review_content.Placements: Total number of students in our course is 350. The highest salary package offered is 30 LPA. The average salary package offered is 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Phonak, Alps, Robotics, etc. Around 90% of students got placed in hearing aid companies like Alps, Cochlear, etc. Roles offered are cochlear implants, hearing aid fitting, speech and language therapy, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very clean. It provides free Wi-Fi, library, lab, etc. Hostel is very clean and it is so nice. Food quality is awesome and also having so many big playgrounds. We also have a badminton court, a basketball court, and a gym. Games are available like cricket, football, and basketball.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Memorable part of my happy life.

review_content.Placements: There are 250 students in our batch. Some students failed and 170 students passed. There are no salary packages offered as it is an MBBS course but internships are compulsory. Our college offered a stipend of Rs. 12,000 per month. Overall, it is a good course but students have to give their valuable years to it. After internships, students can get jobs in hospitals and can experience good things to improve their skills and knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are very good classrooms. The campus is very good. Our classrooms have air conditioners, projectors, well-organised benches, lights, etc. Our college building has a library and a reading room. Hostel rooms are fully furnished but not air-conditioned. There is a common central mess for all hostellers. The sports area and garden are available on the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: All about Sri Aurobindo Medical College.

review_content.Placements: In MBBS, every student gets the chance for an internship just by passing all the 4.5 years of examinations. There is no package system; it's all about completing the MBBS. After graduation, the government will provide placements according to their bond in rural areas, and you can also pursue PG after completing your graduation.
review_content.Infrastructure: AIMS Indore is the best private college in Madhya Pradesh. All the facilities provided are world-class. For example, the library is an excellent place to study, with access to all the books and theses. We have a central lab that diagnoses various diseases like sickle cell anemia and cancer. Hostel accommodation is not mandatory, so I chose to live outside as a day scholar.

overview_faqs.question: Is Sri Aurobindo Institute of Medical Science a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Sri Aurobindo Institute of Medical Science is a well-known institution for M.Sc, Ph.D, B.Sc, MDS, ANM, MD, MS, GNM, DM, M.Ch, MBBS, BDS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Sri Aurobindo Institute of Medical Science has a rating of 4.32 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.61 on Campus Life, 3.79 on Placements, 4.45 on Faculty and 4.46 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Sri Aurobindo Institute of Medical Science?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Sri Aurobindo Institute of Medical Science is around INR 25000 - INR 9900000.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Aurobindo Institute of Medical Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: There is a very good infrastructure of college and hostels, also their faculty is very supportive.

content.Placements: I am a student of the 2023 batch doing MBBS at Aurobindo Institute of Medical Science and Technology. After completing the course, Only MBBS students get the opportunities. Rather than any courses, after my degree, I would open my own college where 75 to 80% students get placements in MBBS. It was very tough to get placements.
content.Infrastructure: A bed, chair, and table in one room. There were 3 girls living in the Pay hostel. Fees and get your room easily. For PG, there was also a flat 1 Lakh PG flat rent. Normal Hostel feel was very high now 70k around. Hostel Fee 85000 per year. College buildings were absolutely very good in condition, with AC library and lecture halls.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure of Sri Aurobindo University, Indore.

content.Placements: I am a 3rd-year student at Sri Aurobindo Institute of Medical Sciences Indore from 2022 batch (MBBS). To get admission, first I have to clear the entrance exam which is NEET UG. It is a 5.5-year course in which 1 year is of internship i.e. 4.5 years of college and 1 year of internship. The eligibility criteria for getting into this college are you have to clear the cutoff for this college in the NEET exam and must have at least 50% marks in each subject in 12th. As this college is in Madhya Pradesh it provides various scholarships like MMVY post metric, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Sri Aurobindo Institutes' infrastructure is very good, it has a very beautiful garden, for sports, there are well-maintained cricket ground on the backside of college, a very large library, and a reading room is also in front of the library. The hospital and college buildings are common which can provide better clinical exposure to students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely awesome college.

content.Placements: Total number of students in our course is 350. The highest salary package offered is 30 LPA. The average salary package offered is 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Phonak, Alps, Robotics, etc. Around 90% of students got placed in hearing aid companies like Alps, Cochlear, etc. Roles offered are cochlear implants, hearing aid fitting, speech and language therapy, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very clean. It provides free Wi-Fi, library, lab, etc. Hostel is very clean and it is so nice. Food quality is awesome and also having so many big playgrounds. We also have a badminton court, a basketball court, and a gym. Games are available like cricket, football, and basketball.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Memorable part of my happy life.

content.Placements: There are 250 students in our batch. Some students failed and 170 students passed. There are no salary packages offered as it is an MBBS course but internships are compulsory. Our college offered a stipend of Rs. 12,000 per month. Overall, it is a good course but students have to give their valuable years to it. After internships, students can get jobs in hospitals and can experience good things to improve their skills and knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: There are very good classrooms. The campus is very good. Our classrooms have air conditioners, projectors, well-organised benches, lights, etc. Our college building has a library and a reading room. Hostel rooms are fully furnished but not air-conditioned. There is a common central mess for all hostellers. The sports area and garden are available on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: All about Sri Aurobindo Medical College.

content.Placements: In MBBS, every student gets the chance for an internship just by passing all the 4.5 years of examinations. There is no package system; it's all about completing the MBBS. After graduation, the government will provide placements according to their bond in rural areas, and you can also pursue PG after completing your graduation.
content.Infrastructure: AIMS Indore is the best private college in Madhya Pradesh. All the facilities provided are world-class. For example, the library is an excellent place to study, with access to all the books and theses. We have a central lab that diagnoses various diseases like sickle cell anemia and cancer. Hostel accommodation is not mandatory, so I chose to live outside as a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: There is a very good infrastructure of college and hostels, also their faculty is very supportive.
reviews.review_text: A bed, chair, and table in one room. There were 3 girls living in the Pay hostel. Fees and get your room easily. For PG, there was also a flat 1 Lakh PG flat rent. Normal Hostel feel was very high now 70k around. Hostel Fee 85000 per year. College buildings were absolutely very good in condition, with AC library and lecture halls.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure of Sri Aurobindo University, Indore.
reviews.review_text: Sri Aurobindo Institutes' infrastructure is very good, it has a very beautiful garden, for sports, there are well-maintained cricket ground on the backside of college, a very large library, and a reading room is also in front of the library. The hospital and college buildings are common which can provide better clinical exposure to students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely awesome college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very clean. It provides free Wi-Fi, library, lab, etc. Hostel is very clean and it is so nice. Food quality is awesome and also having so many big playgrounds. We also have a badminton court, a basketball court, and a gym. Games are available like cricket, football, and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: Memorable part of my happy life.
reviews.review_text: There are very good classrooms. The campus is very good. Our classrooms have air conditioners, projectors, well-organised benches, lights, etc. Our college building has a library and a reading room. Hostel rooms are fully furnished but not air-conditioned. There is a common central mess for all hostellers. The sports area and garden are available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: All about Sri Aurobindo Medical College.
reviews.review_text: AIMS Indore is the best private college in Madhya Pradesh. All the facilities provided are world-class. For example, the library is an excellent place to study, with access to all the books and theses. We have a central lab that diagnoses various diseases like sickle cell anemia and cancer. Hostel accommodation is not mandatory, so I chose to live outside as a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: Sri Aurobindo Institute of Medical Science, Indore Honest review.
reviews.review_text: The college has a huge central mess that serves four meals a day. It is well-lit, hygienic, and comfortable. Each room has a bed, table, chair, bookshelf, and almirah. The best feature is that each room has an attached washroom and bathroom.

reviews.review_heading: Best private medical college in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The Central Library has free Wi-Fi and books of all subjects related to medical science with different publishers. Central mess provides good quality food; however, we often eat outside a lot due to a lack of variation in taste. Hostel rooms are well furnished, but the majority of students opt to live outside the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best medical college, Better than I have ever imagined.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully air-conditioned, and Wi-Fi enables the central library, and same goes for most classes and Labs, public areas for students and well-equipped labs for all courses. There are different hostels present and the mess food is very good having both north Indian as well as South Indian dishes and vegetarian and non-vegetarian.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Aurobindo Institute of Medical Science.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is great, with a positive vibe and good hygiene. All facilities are available, and there is good communication between faculty and students. Cultural events are also organized on some days, with active participation and enjoyment.

reviews.review_heading: Always satisfied the with faculty and really nice infrastructure with hostel and mess.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. There are many halls like pansy, daffodil, lavender etc. Library is also available for self study to students. There is modern technology available. Hostel is very nice which provides good quality of food with minimum price of INR 76k.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very huge. The infrastructure of our college is very good. Wi-Fi is available 24X7 in the library. Reading rooms are open 24X7 in our college. The library is closed only on Sundays, but the reading hall is open on weekends and other holidays. The hostel contains a gym and trainers. The mess facility is very good compared to nearby places like hotels and other nearby messes.

reviews.review_heading: This college is great all over India and it has the best medical field.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The nursing college work according to the Indian nursing council. All rules and regulations are strictly followed. Faculty members do hard-work with students. Now Aurobindo has its university.

reviews.review_heading: A costly Institute but gives value for money in MBBS.
reviews.review_text: There were separate departments for every subject with attached practical labs and within the department, there was a departmental library with access to the literature of the particular department. There were separate fully air-conditioned halls for every department where classes used to take place. The hostel facilities were pretty average with 3 people sharing rooms. In the campus, there is facility of indoor games like table tennis and chess.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides great learning environment, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: College environment is great. Classrooms are great, clean, and air-conditioned. There are about 9 dental departments and the rest are medical ones. Library is average and does not maintain the latest edition of books. One fest is organised every year called harmony in which all the sports and culturals take place. There is a badminton court. There are hostels for three or two students with 3-time meals.

reviews.review_heading: It is a reputated college and has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. It provides games and a refreshing ambiance all over the campus. It is so beneficial for us. The college also provides canteens that serve quality food. In our college, there are e-library and library facilities.

It has more than 60 courses, and many departments have their own buildings.

Candidates can apply for the preferred course by filling out the form on the institute's website.

admission_process.title: Acharya Institute of Health Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Acharya Institute of Health Sciences admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. Aspirants need to participate in the selection process to get a seat in the institute. The application process for AIHS is conducted online for all the programmes. Below is theAIHS admission process:

Students have to first register on the institution's website to generate login credentials. Aspirants then need to log in and fill out the application form for the preferred course. Students also need to pay a non-refundable application fee to apply for a programme.

Aspirants taking admission in merit-based courses have to only fill out the application form and wait for confirmation from the institute. For MPT, aspirants need to appear for the entrance exam conducted by AIHS. Once the results of the test is announced, aspirants have to participate inthe  further process.

Once all the selection rounds are over, shortlisted aspirants have to report at the campus for document verification. Further, students also need to pay theAIHS feeto confirm their seats. Below are the documents required at the time of admission:

The total fee of AIHS is a sum of various components such as caution deposit, tuition fee, exam fee, etc. Aspirants who are selected for admission need to confirm their seat by paying the course fee. The total seats available for MHA is 60. Below is course-wise AIHS fee:

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college if you want to grow in the future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is excellent. All facilities are very good. Our campus is huge. A playground is available for cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, badminton, and baseball. There is a huge central library, and we can study there peacefully. It has more than 60 courses, and many departments have their own buildings.

reviews.review_heading:
Absolutely satisfied with the faculty 
Good campus 
Som rules are not good 
.
reviews.review_text: The college provide Wi-Fi for all the students. Every classroom has one Wi-Fi box. Labs are provided for all medical courses. Classes room have projector. Medical field has a separate library. The hostel is good and strict. Food is good in hostel. Sports are conducted on February.

reviews.review_heading: Much satisfied because of good faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities and infrastructure for our course with good labs and shipments. The classrooms have projectors. A good library is available with sufficient books required for the course. The quality of the hostel, mess and canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Acharya Institute of Health Sciences is the best college.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities provided by the department were excellent. There is Wi-Fi, a library, laboratory for BMLT also. The hostel mess food is healthy. When there is any need for medical they provide the first aid. College conducted the games and sports every year. There is another cultural program also organized.

reviews.review_heading: Acharya Institute of Health Sciences is satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and we have a lab, classroom, library, and a good studying environment. The library has a lot of books to refer which will help to gain more knowledge. The hostel infrastructure is satisfactory, there is a dining area and room 3 or 4 shares a room, and a canteen facility is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Acharya Institute of Health Sciences is the best.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities provided by the department were excellent. There is Wi-Fi, a library, laboratory for BMIT also. The hostel mess food is healthy. When there is any need for medical the facilities provide the first aid. College conducted the games and sports every year. There is another cultural program also organized.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my decision of choosing this college.
reviews.review_text: There are all the facilities provided required for our academics like physiology lab, anatomy lab, and library. Classrooms are clean and spacious. There are many extra curriculum activities like sports and culturals along with conferences and health camps are organized yearly.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much satisfied for joining this college.
reviews.review_text: There are all the facilities for studies like physiology lab, anatomy lab, outpatient department, and library. There are many sports activities with other extracurricular activities that take place every year.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is best for pursuing physiotherapy.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities for our academics like the library, physiology lab, and anatomy lab are available. Classrooms are clean and provided with projectors and blackboards.  There are many extra curriculum activities and sports activities. They have many health check-up camps.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is best for physiotherapy with all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are all the facilities except a few like hydrotherapy. Hostel facilities were average but the food is good as it comes from our college canteen. Water supply and the environment are good for studies.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good classrooms.
reviews.review_text: There are clean classrooms and campus.  We have a good library with all the books. Canteen is also clean and good food is available. Campus is full of greenery and has good lighting and a pleasant environment. Sports facilities are also available. We have also participated in the conference.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: We have all facilities required for the study like anatomy lab, physiology lab, OPD department, clinical postings, and many other health camps where we get a learn. The library is good. Sports activities are very enjoyable and medical facilities are good. The canteen is also good and the classrooms are clean.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have been provided with good classrooms, a library, and OPD which makes us comfortable to attend the classes. We got good facilities in the hostel including rooms, beds, etc. The food quality is good. We have good lab facilities for anatomy, physiology, hematology, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am very proud to be a student of Acharya Institute.
reviews.review_text: There is a hostel at a walkable distance and is separate for boys and girls. The rooms in hostels are spacious and have good accommodation facilities. Cleanliness and hygiene is maintained by cleaners. Hostel warden is available to take care of everything. The food is good which includes wholesome meals and provides nutrition. They provide various opportunities to show sports skills in different sports like football, kabaddi, and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the opportunities we have in our college.
reviews.review_text: We have nice facilities in our college such as spacious classrooms, clean restrooms, and a spacious library in our college where we will get every textbook and informative book. The hostel rooms are very spacious and food is very good. In our college, they will conduct sports competition every year.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: It is a medical degree. So, of course, every person who graduates from college becomes a doctor. After the degree, the average salary of the doctor is 80,000 to 120000 per month. Each and every student in the batch gets an internship in the hospital of the college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are world-class facilities for the learning of medical science in my college. There are very well-educated professors who love to teach the students. There are many labs designed for every department. There is also a central library, which is rich in every type of book related to medical science. The facilities in hostels are quite decent. The quality of food in a mess is average. There are many opportunities in sports like basketball, volleyball, badminton, cricket, table tennis, and many more.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the faculty members, and I am happy with the college's infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Everyone gets placement and gets a 1-year internship. Internships provide Rs. 43,000 monthly. 100% of students get internships in this college, which are for a one-year basis. The college provides MBBS courses through NEET. DMLT and nursing courses are also available. BDS seats are also available.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are very nice, well-spaced, accommodating approximately 400 students. The library has all necessary facilities, with books from various authors that are very useful for students. The labs are also in very good condition. The infrastructure is excellent, with all facilities available.

individual_reviews.title: Really satisfied and very happy to find me in this college.

content.Placements: The placement of this college is very good. There is a one-year internship at this college. In an internship, there is a stipend of Rs. 43000 monthly. 100 percent of the students get an internship for one year. Then students get jobs in any government or private hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-neat and clean. There is a central library, which is very big, and there are many books present there. The laboratories are well-equipped and have all the facilities. The Wi-Fi is present in the library, classrooms, and other areas as well. There are 5 canteens for UG students. There are other materials present that are for PG students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: It is a medical degree. So, of course, every person who graduates from college becomes a doctor. After the degree, the average salary of the doctor is 80,000 to 120000 per month. Each and every student in the batch gets an internship in the hospital of the college itself.
content.Infrastructure: There are world-class facilities for the learning of medical science in my college. There are very well-educated professors who love to teach the students. There are many labs designed for every department. There is also a central library, which is rich in every type of book related to medical science. The facilities in hostels are quite decent. The quality of food in a mess is average. There are many opportunities in sports like basketball, volleyball, badminton, cricket, table tennis, and many more.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty members, and I am happy with the college's infrastructure.

content.Placements: Everyone gets placement and gets a 1-year internship. Internships provide Rs. 43,000 monthly. 100% of students get internships in this college, which are for a one-year basis. The college provides MBBS courses through NEET. DMLT and nursing courses are also available. BDS seats are also available.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are very nice, well-spaced, accommodating approximately 400 students. The library has all necessary facilities, with books from various authors that are very useful for students. The labs are also in very good condition. The infrastructure is excellent, with all facilities available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: SCB is the pioneer of eastern India.

content.Placements: SCB is one of the pioneer medical colleges of eastern India. It is one of the most decorated and highly value medical colleges with a great alumni to back up its reputation. Almost 90% students qualify for opsc (state examination for government. Job) or NEET PG (to pursue PG further) after completing their course from here .
content.Infrastructure: The hostels have been upgraded to a good quality stay. It is student friendly and gives an atmosphere for studying. There is Wi-Fi of college absolutely free 24 x 7. The downgrade if you can say is in each room 3 students stay which is not what the modern trend is. But if you ask me its fun to have friends in a single room to share each and every joy and sorrows. For the food there are 5 different type of mess. You can eat in any of them and pay monthly on only the food you have eaten. The prices are good and good taste with standard quality food. There are sports like basketball, cricket, football, TT and sports meet organised each year in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of SCB medical college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is really good. Campus is very big and it looks very beautiful. All the necessary facilities like Wi-Fi, water supply, electricity are 24 *7 available. Hostel have well furnished rooms and also a beautiful park. Quality of food is acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Srirama Chandra Bhanja Medical College and Hospital.
reviews.review_text: Our college had good hostels. The infrastructure was good. There was no cleanliness in the hospital, but the hostel area was very clean and full of trees so you could have a good atmosphere to study in. There was a library and reading room with air-conditioning so you won't find any difficulty. Only the first year was a bit difficult.

reviews.review_heading: We say here 'once a SCBIAN always a SCBIAN'.
reviews.review_text: This is a free Wi-Fi campus with a speed of around 5 mbps. Academic building, hostels and mess are also equipped well with college Wi-Fi. There's a huge library with a capacity of around 1000 students. Labs are equipped with all possible modern equipment and in upcoming years it is going to improve a lot. According to the vision of Odisha government SCB MEDICAL COLLEGE will be one of the best medical college in India and will be designated as AIIMS PLUS MEDICAL COLLEGE.

reviews.review_heading: It's very lively here, each moment memorable n valuable.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, library, canteen, park gym, auditorium, reading room everything available, swimming pool, playground with an indoor games room for TT, badminton, also available. The food quality of hostels is good and we have 3-4 mess so we can choose which we want and also food verities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has it's own identity.
reviews.review_text: It has the best infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: A dream college for many students who worked hard to be a doctor.
reviews.review_text: Excellent hostel infrastructure and facilities. Well-maintained bathrooms are present. Mess canteen along with snacks store and small Xerox shop also available. Wi-Fi is also available with appreciable network speed. Nice food is being provided in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best clinical study environment.
reviews.review_text: This college provides well-maintained hostels. It has clean bathrooms, and aqua guards have been provided on each floor of the hostels. Wi-Fi is also available. Various sports including basketball, table tennis, cricket, football, volleyball, and gym facilities have also been provided.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure and great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It provides great infrastructure and it is also under development. Our campus is also good. Nature-friendly college surroundings are there. It has an eco-friendly environment and soothing temperature around the campus area. Hospital is also clean and patient inflow is also spectacular.

reviews.review_heading: SCB Medical College is one of the best and the oldest colleges in Odisha and also in India.
reviews.review_text: All the departments, labs and classrooms have AC. All the departments have many experienced professors. There are many departments like anatomy, dissection hall, physiology and biochemistry practical labs, pathology lab, and study rooms are available for students. The food quality in our canteen is very good. Sports grounds are available for different athletic activities for medical students.

reviews.review_heading: This is one of the best and oldest colleges of Odisha and also India.
reviews.review_text: All the departments have many experienced professionals. All the rooms are Wi-Fi enabled. There are many departmental labs like biochemistry lab, physiology lab, pathology lab etc. For studying there, a reading room, library, etc., are available. The food quality is very good at decent prices.

This is a way by which faculty members or teachers tell stories related to the concepts being taught by them. Students are taught leadership and team skills through Outbound Training. BTech students after completing their education at this university can become Software Engineers, Data Scientists, or can take up various job opportunities relevant to their stream. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sanskriti University offers PG and UG courses to students across the Management, Engineering, and several other streams. At the UG level, the university provides BTech, BSc, BPharma, and others. At the PG level, the university provides MPharma, MTech, MSc, MBA, and others. BTech is provided in 6 specialisations, namely Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Cloud Technology & Information Security, Mechanical Engineering, and others. The university also provides PhD courses to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Sanskriti University and their respective eligibility and Sanskriti University Mathura B Tech fees and other course fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Sanskriti University does not enrol students to the BTech programme directly without first passing the standard admission test. According to the information supplied, JEE Mains scores will determine admission to Sanskrit University's B.Tech programmes. No direct admission options are mentioned for B.Tech candidates. Other programs like MBA or Ph.D. may have exemptions from written exams for those who have already passed certain entrance exams, but these exemptions are on a case-by-case basis. Case basis as per university rules. So, if you want to do BA in Sanskriti University you have to clear JEE Mains Finals.
faqs.question: Can I join Sanskriti University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes. Sanskriti University accepts JEE for admission to the B.Tech programme. The foundation for admission to the BTech curriculum is the attainment of valid JEE Mains entrance test scores. Admissions are granted not just on the basis of JEE but also on the merit of the qualifying test.
faqs.question: Does Sanskriti University accept JEE for B.Tech?

faqs.answer: A:    Sanskriti University offers MCA courses for the duration of two years, divided into four semesters, and offered in full-time mode. Additionally, the university also offers integrated BCA+MCA courses for the duration of four years. The eligibility criteria for the MCA course is candidates must complete a bachelor's degree in a relevant field with a minimum of 50%. For integrated BCA+ MCA courses, candidates are required to qualify the Class 12 with relevant subjects with at least an aggregate of 50%.
faqs.question: What is the Sanskriti University MCA duration?

faqs.answer: A:    For MCA at Sanskriti University, a candidate must give CUET-PG with a graduation score of 50% (45% for reserved category candidates). The total tuition fees for MCA range from INR 1.2 Lacs to INR 3.8 lakh. The average package provided by the university for the MCA course is around INR 4 Lacs as per recent data.

review_content.Placements: I am a third-year student of BCA at Sanskriti University. I belong to the 2023-2026 batch. The placement opportunities for BCA students are very good. The university provides very good future opportunities. The placement cell is very supportive and keeps students informed about placement drives and training sessions. Top companies like TCS, Wipro, and HCL visit the college for recruitment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Sanskriti University provides well-developed and well-maintained infrastructure for BCA students. Classrooms are spacious and clean with basic teaching facilities like projectors and smart boards. There are also high-tech computer labs that provide practical learning experience to students.

reviews_list.review_title: Good place to study with a lot of enjoyment.

review_content.Placements: In my Course, less than 20 percent of students get placed in IT. The lowest package offered is 1 LPA, and the highest package offered is 6 LPA. 85 percent of students got internship in different companies. Some students get remote, and some get onsite. According to my course offer, Data Analyst, Software Engineer, and AIML, etc students find it difficult to get placed in this field otherwise students have many placement offers in different fields like BPO and KPO.
review_content.Infrastructure: Courses are good, and my overall experience is positive. Students get enrolled in the course because of the beautiful environment and natural vibes. The department is friendly. Wi-Fi has good speed. Labs are good and well organized. Classrooms are good. Library is awesome and peaceful place.

faqs.answer: National Testing Agency re-commenced CUET 2026 registration on February 23, 2026. Soon after the release of the CUET notification, candidates can check the important dates about CUET 2026. The last date for CUET 2026 registration was February 26, 2026 (11.50 PM).Candidates were required to fill the CUET application form within the given time frame, failing which no request for extension of the CUET registration last date will be entertained. NTA does not provide the window for late fee payment. CUET 2026 application process is in online mode. No physical copies of the CUET application form must be sent to the authorities.

paragraphs: Sanskrit University offers UG and PG for admission 2025. Candidate's UG academic programmes determine their eligibility for postgraduate studies. For diploma courses, applicants must have finished Class 10 with at least 50%. Sanskrit University offers four years of full-time BTech in various Engineering specialisations.The candidates' performance on their qualifying exams determines their admission to these programmes.

For Sanskriti University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toSanskriti University courseadmissions 2025:

Sanskriti University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process for Sanskriti University admissions 2025:

Applicants can obtain the application form from the official Sanskriti University website to start the admissions process. Candidates can send the completed form to the appropriate department at Sanskriti University in person or by mail. Candidates must submit their application form online with two copies of their online bank challan and a pay slip to complete the application and entrance exam costs.

Admission 2025 to Sanskrit University's UG and PG programmes is determined by entrance exams. For the applicable courses, candidates must be eligible to take admission exams at the state or university levels, such as the CAT or MAT. Furthermore, the undergraduate programmes provided by associated institutions are determined by the merit scores earned in the most recent qualifying test.

Following the conclusion of the selection stages, applicants take part in the course counselling process. The chosen applicants are then included on merit lists, which are released by Sanskriti University in several rounds. To reserve a place, those whose names are on the merit list must pay a certain amount.

faqs.question: Does Sanskriti University accept JEE for B.Tech?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sanskriti University accepts JEE for admission to the B.Tech programme. The foundation for admission to the BTech curriculum is the attainment of valid JEE Mains entrance test scores. Admissions are granted not just on the basis of JEE but also on the merit of the qualifying test.

faqs.question: Does Sanskriti University offer lateral entry admission to the BTech program?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sanskrit University provides lateral entry admission to its BTech curriculum. A minimum of 55% in a three-year diploma in the appropriate engineering is needed to be admitted to this curriculum. A number of engineering specialisations, including electrical, mechanical, computer science and engineering, civil, and electrical engineering, are available for lateral entry admission to the BTech curriculum at Sanskriti University. The duration of the BTech lateral entry programme is three years.

faqs.question: Can I join Sanskriti University directly?
faqs.answer: Sanskriti University does not enrol students to the BTech programme directly without first passing the standard admission test. According to the information supplied, JEE Mains scores will determine admission to Sanskrit University's B.Tech programmes. No direct admission options are mentioned for B.Tech candidates. Other programs like MBA or Ph.D. may have exemptions from written exams for those who have already passed certain entrance exams, but these exemptions are on a case-by-case basis. Ca

faqs.question: From where can I download CAT question papers?
faqs.answer: CAT question papers are released within a week of the exam in the form of a PDF as a response sheet and answer key. Candidates who have appeared for the test are able to access the CAT question paper and answer key. The question paper of every slot is released on the same day along with candidate response sheet and official answer to all question. If any candidate needs previous year CAT question papers for preparation purpose, then they can download them from Shiksha website. We have hosted las

outlook.description:
According to the rankings from Outlook, Sanskriti University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment.
It has been recognized that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'MBA (Private)' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, Sanskriti University fell 64 ranks to #84 rank in the 'MBA (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'BBA' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2024, Sanskriti University fell 5 ranks to #67 rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
