hostel_campus.college_name: Sanskriti University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University has separate hostels for both boys and girls at present there are 5 hostels out of which 4 for boys and within campus and one is for girls which is off campus. Spacious rooms with necessary furniture are provide. 24*7 internet facility & water supply facility is available. other than that drinking water, facilities for both indoor and outdoor games and mess facility is provided. AC and non AC room is available for the students.

library.description: The library is well-stocked with more than 25,000 books. It subscribes to approximately 50 Indian and 25 foreign journals apart from e-journals and comprises of both national and international journal. Book bank facility is provided to the students. Digital library is linked to DELNET. It provides the facility of inter-connection of all libraries registered under DELNET scheme. This facilitates access to a wide range of book, journals, magazines, etc.The library has reprographic facility, reading hall,digital and webinar facilities.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court

library.description: The library is well-stocked with more than 25,000 books. It subscribes to approximately 50 Indian and 25 foreign journals apart from e-journals and comprises of both national and international journal. Book bank facility is provided to the students. Digital library is linked to DELNET. It provides the facility of inter-connection of all libraries registered under DELNET scheme. This facilitates access to a wide range of book, journals, magazines, etc.The library has reprographic facility, reading hall,digital and webinar facilities.

cafeteria.description: University has well equipped and furnished cafeteria and other eateries which provides healthy and hygienic food. Other than that internet cafe are also there in cafeterias for students. The cafeterias functioning is based on pay and eat concept.

hostel.description: University has separate hostels for both boys and girls at present there are 5 hostels out of which 4 for boys and within campus and one is for girls which is off campus. Spacious rooms with necessary furniture are provide. 24*7 internet facility & water supply facility is available. other than that drinking water, facilities for both indoor and outdoor games and mess facility is provided. AC and non AC room is available for the students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Design Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Medical Lab, Physics Lab, Front Office Lab

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience at Sanskriti University.
reviews.review_text: The university provide updated study model with advanced lab facilities and with high tech class room. The hostel provided by the university is very clean, and the mess of the university is very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: If you want a strong background in management, come to Sanskriti.
reviews.review_text: The university provides a very well-developed infrastructure. The environment of the university is very green and clean. The Sanskriti University provides modern lab facilities to its students and all the basic facilities needed. The classrooms of the Sanskriti University are very well ventilated with modern facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The university is overall very good for students who want to learn new skills.
reviews.review_text: Sanskriti University provides well-developed and well-maintained infrastructure for BCA students. Classrooms are spacious and clean with basic teaching facilities like projectors and smart boards. There are also high-tech computer labs that provide practical learning experience to students.

reviews.review_heading: Good place to study with a lot of enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Courses are good, and my overall experience is positive. Students get enrolled in the course because of the beautiful environment and natural vibes. The department is friendly. Wi-Fi has good speed. Labs are good and well organized. Classrooms are good. Library is awesome and peaceful place.

reviews.review_heading: The university is good for exposure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good and the infrastructure is fantastic. I love it. Their labs, classrooms, and library facilities are also good. The hostels are neat and clean, and 2 or more beds are available in one room. The mess canteen provides good food for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is good.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure with proper facilities, best library, best classroom with AC classes, best Wi-Fi facility. There are the best hostel facilities, the quality of food is available here, and a good mess and canteen. The college provides the best medical facilities, sports grounds, and better games.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure. Many students get placed here.
reviews.review_text: The university provides an excellent range of infrastructure that includes library facilities, a mess, and a canteen. It has good campus facilities. There is also a sports zone. There are separate zones for each class of students. There is a good place to study and a great environment.

reviews.review_heading: I think this is best for average students.
reviews.review_text: Our libraries, cafeteria, computer labs, and classrooms are digital. Hostel food is average, and sports fests are held. For medical needs, there's a wellness center and hospital on the second campus, but these facilities aren't utilized. The food available in the mess is average in taste but good in quality, while the canteen offers both good taste and quality.

reviews.review_heading: Best and management faculty members. Good placement and best facilities.
reviews.review_text: Best facilities were there like Wi-Fi, labs, and best classroom. Best food was provided in hostel mess and canteen. Medical facilities were available. Classrooms were best. Water and canteen facilities were the best. Sports ground was available. Games were played every day. For students, fans and air-coolers were available in any classroom.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanskriti University in a positive way.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is the best and maintained. Some new blocks are ready for students in which new classrooms, labs, and the library are ready. There are two different areas of hostels, one for girls and the other for boys with all types of rooms and facilities. The college provides all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The experience I needed to explore was very satisfying. Even the infrastructure is very friendly.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very friendly and joyful. The classrooms are clean every block has its library and there are 6 computer labs and each lab has around 100 computers. Let's talk about the hostel, there are many options for the hostel room AC, non-AC, sharing rooms, and non-sharing rooms. The food quality is average and the hostel's nature is very excellent.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good, 3 seaters to 6 seaters. We can choose anything and fee will be according to that. For 3 seaters and food fee is Rs 60,000 per year. Food is good sometimes not good enough. Everyone will have a table, chair, safe, and bed. Every room has a balcony. The main reason behind choosing this course is my interest in computer science, and the reason behind choosing this department is the placement and seniors/alumni (they are very helpful). Faculty members are also good here. All teachers...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and placements are really good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are of good quality, allowing for participation in all activities. The quality of facilities in the hostel, college playground, and so on, is good, and the labs and Wi-Fi in college were useful to students. The medical facilities they provide are good.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best college, and the environment is mind-blowing.
reviews.review_text: This university provided every kind of facility for students, like proper Wi-Fi connectivity, labs for practicals, classrooms with projectors, and a library with a peaceful environment. The mess food wasn't too good, but if we talk about the canteen, it was good. We also had a hospital inside our college for treatment and a gaming zone also.

reviews.review_heading: Sanskriti university college review .
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average. The Wi-Fi facility provided in the college and hostel is very poor. Computers do not work properly. Mess food is not good. Sports, games, and e-sports are conducted. There are no good quality products. Walls of the college building are damaged.

review_summary.college_name: Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Magnificent library open 24/7 with a cafeteria.

content.Placements: After the completion of 9 semesters, students join the internship programme in which they are paid Rs. 30000 per month, following which students must clear another entrance exam to the PG seats. The highest package offered varies with the choice of course and is not fixed, but all the candidates earn 12 times higher than the national average salary. Usually, 100% placement is provided. My plan is to pursue an MD in any of the medicine and allied subjects.
content.Infrastructure: In the first and second year, you get a double-sharing room, but from the third year to the final year, you get a single room. The facilities provided in the rooms are bed, a study table, a cupboard, free electricity, water, and a private attached bathroom (with a geyser). The best part is the washing machines provided on every floor. Also, a water cooler is available on every floor. You are also allowed to modify rooms at your choice.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: There is OPD and exposure to patients on a daily basis, and case presentations.

content.Placements: We have to do internships in our own college since OPD is here only. It includes 7-8 hours of jobs along with weekly to monthly subject change and exposure. Medicine, surgery, orthopedics, radiology, dermatology, and all postings are there. The salary offered for interns is around Rs. 30,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel has great and spacious rooms, which are very well-maintained. Cupboard, mattress, study table, bed, ergonomic chair, a show track, along with a shared bathroom for first years and attached for second onwards are provided. Rooms are double sharing for the first year and single after that. Everything is very well maintained. Mess food is good with four meals a day and regular quality checks. Registration is very straightforward and included in the admission process.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is so relevant and wonderful.

content.Placements: About 8% of students are placed in this college. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the lowest is 10 LPA. After MBBS, the PG course is offered as a premium for my course, for which we have to take an entrance examination to pass the PG.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers a well-defined infrastructure, and there are several labs for practical experiments, Wi-Fi, and well-equipped classrooms for studying. The quality of the mess and hostels for accommodation is very well planned and hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Great campus with fresh buildings, greenery, fresh air, outside the city.

content.Placements: Internships have to be within NSCB itself, and a lot of experience is gained by spending time in different departments of the hospital. The stipend is around Rs. 30,000 per month. You have to interact with patients, listen to them carefully, and give them a diagnosis just like a real doctor. This also helps build interaction skills.
content.Infrastructure: Students get a double room in the first year and a single room from the second year. The hostel rooms have a bed, a wardrobe, a study table, a comfortable chair, and a side table. The rooms are well-lit. The hostel's safety is well maintained by the security guards. The hostel fee is included in the total college fees of Rs. 5856 for 5.5 years, so there’s no need to pay separately. The mess fee as of now is Rs. 4300/month. The package includes 4 meals a day, i.e., breakfast, lunch, evening snacks, and dinner. The food quality is good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: First of all, the college or hospital has a lot of case loads which gives an amazing opportunity.

content.Placements: There was a mandatory internship in MBBS for 12 months, in which you had to go in different departments such as surgery, medicine, obs gynae, derma, ortho, etc., for variable period of time. It offered a great deal of knowledge regarding various medical procedures, patient interaction, and their medical conditions. During the internship, you had to do sampling, catheterization, various medical procedures, and a lot of file work.
content.Infrastructure: Life in medical college was full of ups and downs, and was quite thrilling. At times, you will be enjoying your life to the full and at other times, you will be studying many sleepless nights but it was quite amazing. You will find many great people and friends for a lifetime.

hostel_campus.college_name: Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose Medical College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Magnificent library open 24/7 with a cafeteria.
reviews.review_text: In the first and second year, you get a double-sharing room, but from the third year to the final year, you get a single room. The facilities provided in the rooms are bed, a study table, a cupboard, free electricity, water, and a private attached bathroom (with a geyser). The best part is the washing machines provided on every floor. Also, a water cooler is available on every floor. You are also allowed to modify rooms at your choice.

reviews.review_heading: There is OPD and exposure to patients on a daily basis, and case presentations.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has great and spacious rooms, which are very well-maintained. Cupboard, mattress, study table, bed, ergonomic chair, a show track, along with a shared bathroom for first years and attached for second onwards are provided. Rooms are double sharing for the first year and single after that. Everything is very well maintained. Mess food is good with four meals a day and regular quality checks. Registration is very straightforward and included in the admission process.

reviews.review_heading: College is so relevant and wonderful.
reviews.review_text: The college offers a well-defined infrastructure, and there are several labs for practical experiments, Wi-Fi, and well-equipped classrooms for studying. The quality of the mess and hostels for accommodation is very well planned and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus with fresh buildings, greenery, fresh air, outside the city.
reviews.review_text: Students get a double room in the first year and a single room from the second year. The hostel rooms have a bed, a wardrobe, a study table, a comfortable chair, and a side table. The rooms are well-lit. The hostel's safety is well maintained by the security guards. The hostel fee is included in the total college fees of Rs. 5856 for 5.5 years, so there’s no need to pay separately. The mess fee as of now is Rs. 4300/month. The package includes 4 meals a day, i.e., breakfast, lunch, evening snack...

reviews.review_heading: First of all, the college or hospital has a lot of case loads which gives an amazing opportunity.
reviews.review_text: Life in medical college was full of ups and downs, and was quite thrilling. At times, you will be enjoying your life to the full and at other times, you will be studying many sleepless nights but it was quite amazing. You will find many great people and friends for a lifetime.

reviews.review_heading: The college is strict in terms of attendance.
reviews.review_text: Rooms are a little small. We have our personal room with a bathroom, so it is overall good. Rooms include a bed, a wardrobe, a study table, a chair, and we can modify our rooms except for the AC. Meal quality is good. 4 times meals are provided per day, i.e., breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner. For breakfast, we get eggs, bread, butter, milk, and tea on a daily basis. The menu changes daily, which includes either idlis, poha, vada sambhar, dosa, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Everything about this place is good. It is situated on the outskirts of the city.
reviews.review_text: It is necessary to do an internship here after completing four and a half years of study. Stipend is now Rs 13,400, which was Rs 12,700 last year. There is a provision for 6% increment every year, due to which it has increased to Rs. 13,400. Some people who have come from abroad after doing MBBS also come here to do an internships.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are best here. They provide the best knowledge and environment.
reviews.review_text: Life at a medical college campus like the one in Jabalpur often revolved around a mixture of rigorous academic schedules and vibrant social interactions.

reviews.review_heading: Campus has all the things and facilities which you will need, including hostels and libraries.
reviews.review_text: Your life at college totally depended on how you lived it. There was a library with an attached reading room. We had a huge auditorium like AC classrooms with PPT based projector, smart board, and TVs for backbenchers. Sports like basketball and badminton courts were available. Indoor games were also available. Social group Pragyan Shala run by NSCB students in which we help needy kids of nearby villages.

reviews.review_heading: The course is application-based rather than research-based.
reviews.review_text: There is a large auditorium where the annual day and the convocation ceremony take place. There is a sports and gym facility and a library that is open for 12 hours and has plenty of books to read. Charges an exam fee but excludes the hostel charges that are to be paid separately.

reviews.review_heading: The college has excellent academic and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Campus was very good, large, and not far away from the main city. It had various sports grounds like cricket, badminton, and football. Different games like badminton, cricket, football, table tennis, also had great patient inflow.

reviews.review_heading: College is built in a prime location, therefore, patient loads are high, which provides opportunity.
reviews.review_text: The annual fest was held in December, which is the best time of all. There was a wide range of books available in the library, all of which were easily accessible via the library card provided by the college. Sports, etc, were a bit underdeveloped, but on a personal level, everybody was doing well at ATIT. There was Pragyan Shala, which was a student run group in college that aimed to teach and benefit the poor children every Sunday.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are best here, they provide the best knowledge and environment.
reviews.review_text: Library is open from 9 to 5, but there is a reading room beside library which is open 24/7. Inside the campus, we have a badminton court. Social groups like Pragyan Shala are there. My favourite hangout place is the small park inside the campus. There is no gym or cafeteria on the campus. Hostel timings are before 9 at night. Famous hangout place in Jabalpur is for sure Bedhghat.

reviews.review_heading: The college is built in the prime location of Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: There is a bed without a mattress, a chair, and a table provided in the room, along with electricity. No electricity charges or water charges are taken. Meal quality is good, but the menu isn't very varied. Vegetarian food is mostly served. The registration process for the hostel is pretty easy and is generally provided with admission to college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good.
reviews.review_text: I opted for the college hostel. But due to the availability of rooms, 12 students have to stay in dorms together, giving them no privacy. The washrooms are combined, which makes the morning routine a headache. They charge Rs. 12,000 a year just for the rooms, and Rs. 3,000 for food. The quality of the rooms is bad, with no space for you to walk.

highlights.summary: Reva University admissions 2026-27 are open for UG, PG, several Certificate/Diploma, and PG Diploma courses. Below are some of the other important latest updates:

table.details: - 330 by QS World University Ranking 2026 (Southern Asia) - 201-300 by NIRF 2025 (Engineering) - 1001 by QS World University Ranking 2026 (Asia) - 27 by India Today 2024 (Private Universities in India)

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at REVA University Bangalore are its BTech and MBA courses. REVA University Bengaluru offers these programmes to students at UG and PG levels. Further, REVA Bangalore offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum.
Both the MBA and BTech programmes are highly sought-after among students due to the doors they open and create in their future careers with BTech students being suited for technical roles whether it be in Cloud Computing, Data Analysis, Software Engineering or other related fields. Interested candidates can also check the other popular programmes offered at REVA University Bengaluru in the table provided below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

However, according to the latest Reva University NIRF (overall) report, the median salary package for UG (3-year) courses was INR 7 LPA in 2023. It was INR 7.2 LPA in 2022. In 2021, the median salary package of INR 6 LPA was offered to UG (3-year) students. The university offers various UG (3-year) courses like BCom, BSc, BA, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    As per the latest report, the REVA University attracted 621 recruiters for its 2025 placement session who offered a variety of job roles to the students across sectors, such as BFSI, IT, Education, FMCG, Consulting, and E-Commerce, etc. Some of the eminent recruiters included IBM, Amazon, Concentrix, HCL, Deloitte, Wipro, TCS, Infosys, etc. These recruiters placed students with new-age job profiles.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, decent staff, and good placement.

review_content.Placements: Around 70 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 40 LPA and the average is around 6 LPA. Around 60 percent of students got internships from TCS, Wipro, Infosys. Top roles offered are software developer, data analyst, cloud engineer, system engineer. Overall, placement is good this year (2024–2025).
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are well maintained and have Wi-Fi. Food is decent. Medical facilities are available inside the campus, but there is no CCTV in classrooms. Labs are well-equipped, and all types of instruments are available. Classrooms are very well-equipped with smart boards.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: In our college, I am pursuing a B.Tech degree in CSE. In our branch, placements are above average. People with proper knowledge get placed. Many companies visit our college. I think the highest package was 45 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Accenture.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very good. The food court is also nice. We get all types of food items there. Even in our block, we have nice canteens where we can get snacks. Our college has many stalls like Maggi Point, Panchami Sagar, Nandini Cafe, and others.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Accounting and Taxation - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and a huge campus.

review_content.Placements: 70 percent of students are placed. 8LPA is the package provided. Top recruiters are ICICI and Morgan Stanley. Top roles offered are Sales Manager, Tax Consultant, a Financial analyst junior and various jobs. My friends have all been placed and I have also placed in a good firm. Many companies like Tata Consultancy, HDFC Bank, Realty companies and Flipkart come for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has speed Wi-Fi, good food. There are mess, canteens and quality food is served. There is also a medical room for treatment of fever for temporary use, there is a huge ground where people play around and its kind of a park. There are different games played like athletics, basketball, kabaddi and some other sports.

overview_faqs.question: Can I pay my Reva University BCom fees in instalments?
overview_faqs.answer: You can pay fee in instalments for undergraduate programmes, including BCom course. This is meant to make fee payment more manageable for students and families. Fees can be paid online through multiple modes like net banking, UPI, debit/credit cards or bank transfer, and the university provides semester-wise or monthly instalment options as part of its fee structure beyond a one-time application fee.

review_summary.college_name: REVA University Bengaluru Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Robotics and Automation - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and facilities. Faculty members are quite helpful.

content.Placements: As of a batch of 25, 100 percent of students get placed. The lowest package offered is around 3.2 LPA, and the highest package offered is 30 LPA in the B.Tech. in Robotics and Automation batch. The top recruiting companies for our course are ABB and Bosch. 75 percent of students got internships. Roles offered are robotics designer, engineer, and software developer.
content.Infrastructure: The library is open till midnight for studies. The hostel experience is above average. Medical facilities are provided on campus. It also has indoor and outdoor sports. The mess food can be eaten, and weekly they serve non-veg food thrice, which is generally nice. Labs are quite helpful.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued(Jan-2023)- B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Internet of Things) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Decent placements, good student life.

content.Placements: Decent placements, percentage of students placed hasn’t been disclosed yet The highest package shown is 41 LPA by Shinsei Electronics, another package shown is 27.6 LPA by the same company, percentage of internships hasn’t been disclosed, and the roles seem to be network analyst and security analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Very good quality food is available in the food court, good medical facilities with emergency services. A large sports ground with lots of games, Wi-Fi is pretty fast for normal work with a wireless network around 100 Mbps and wired labs around 1 Gbps, a massive library with all relevant materials which are also uploaded online and can be accessed through their website, and smart classrooms with smartboards, TV, projector, and a green board.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Internet of Things and Cyber Security including Block Chain Technology) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, decent staff, and good placement.

content.Placements: Around 70 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 40 LPA and the average is around 6 LPA. Around 60 percent of students got internships from TCS, Wipro, Infosys. Top roles offered are software developer, data analyst, cloud engineer, system engineer. Overall, placement is good this year (2024–2025).
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are well maintained and have Wi-Fi. Food is decent. Medical facilities are available inside the campus, but there is no CCTV in classrooms. Labs are well-equipped, and all types of instruments are available. Classrooms are very well-equipped with smart boards.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: In our college, I am pursuing a B.Tech degree in CSE. In our branch, placements are above average. People with proper knowledge get placed. Many companies visit our college. I think the highest package was 45 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Accenture.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very good. The food court is also nice. We get all types of food items there. Even in our block, we have nice canteens where we can get snacks. Our college has many stalls like Maggi Point, Panchami Sagar, Nandini Cafe, and others.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Accounting and Taxation - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and a huge campus.

content.Placements: 70 percent of students are placed. 8LPA is the package provided. Top recruiters are ICICI and Morgan Stanley. Top roles offered are Sales Manager, Tax Consultant, a Financial analyst junior and various jobs. My friends have all been placed and I have also placed in a good firm. Many companies like Tata Consultancy, HDFC Bank, Realty companies and Flipkart come for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has speed Wi-Fi, good food. There are mess, canteens and quality food is served. There is also a medical room for treatment of fever for temporary use, there is a huge ground where people play around and its kind of a park. There are different games played like athletics, basketball, kabaddi and some other sports.

admission_overview.college_name: REVA University Bengaluru Course Admissions 2026 (Open): Fees, Eligibility, Last Date & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: REVA University Bengaluru Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: REVA University admission 2026 is open. The university offers admission to courses including UG, PG, PhD, several certificate/diploma and PG Diploma programmes. The courses are offered in the fields of Engineering, Architecture, Science & Technology, Commerce, Management Studies, Legal Studies, Arts & Humanities and Performing Arts. REVA University admissions are based on a score in the respective entrance exams. The university conducts REVA CET for admission to UG and PG courses every year between June and July. REVA University also accepts other national-level entrance exam scores and merit in the last qualifying exam for admission.

eligibility_selection.title: REVA University Bengaluru Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: REVA University selects candidates based on their scores in REVA CET or other national or state-level entrance exams. Candidates must also meet eligibility criteria to apply for a course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 and graduation for PG programmes. Check below popular REVA University courses with their eligibility and selection criteria: Courses

courses_table.selection_criteria: KCET/ REVA CET/ CUET/ COMEDK UGET/ Uni-GAUGE/ JEE Main

Any graduation degree (BE/ BTech/ BSc/ BCom/ BA/ BVoc/ BCA, etc.) preferably with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)
PUC or Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate
Bachelor's degree or equivalent with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)

faqs.answer: Yes, REVA University accepts a valid score of KCET entrance exam. This is a state-level entrance exam regulated by Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA), which is valid for admission to BTech at all the colleges of Karnataka state. Candidates applying via KCET score must pass Class 12 in the relevant stream before applying for the course. Futher, aspirants need to register and appear for the exam as per the defined KCET schedule.

paragraphs: REVA University Bangalore admissionis completely entrance-based. The admission process starts with theregistration for REVA CET. This is a common exam conducted for admitting students to most of the UG & PG courses of REVA University. Check below the steps to get a seat in the university:

REVA University Bengaluru accepts applications for both national and international aspirants. The REVA University accepts applications for its REVA CET exam. Candidates can submit form online or offline in the admission office.  Applicants also have to pay an application fee ofINR 500orINR 1,000.

After successfully filling the application form, candidates are selected based on REVA CET exam scores. REVA Bangalore also accepts scores of various state/ national-level exams such as CUET, NATA, JEE Main, KCET, etc. for specific courses. Candidates applying through the scores of any other entrance exam are exempted from REVA CET.

Based on past academic records and entrance exam scores, eligible candidates are shortlisted. The university conducts a common counselling process for the final seat allotment. Selected candidates need to pay theREVA University feesto confirm their seat.
For more information about REVA University check out the below video:

courses_data.name: REVA University Bengaluru MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: REVA University offers a two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The course is divided into four semesters. During the course, students need to choose any one specialisation out of those that are offered. The institute offers over ten specialisations under dual specialisation MBA, some of which are mentioned below: To get admitted to this course, candidates need to pass graduation. Further, candidates have to appear for REVA CET and obtain a valid score in the entrance exam. Candidates can also apply via scores of exams such as CAT, MAT and CMAT. More details around REVA University MBA admission 2026 are given below: Download:REVA Business School Brochure 2026

faqs.question: What is the entrance exam for MBA at REVA University?
faqs.answer: REVA University conducts REVA MAT for admission to MBA programme. Candidates with CAT, MAT or CMAT scores are exempted from appearing for the in-house entrance exam. Aspirants must also complete graduation to get admission in MBA.

faqs.question: Who can apply for MBA at REVA University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must complete graduation from a recognised university with a minimum of 50% aggregate to apply for MBA at REVA University. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for reserved category aspirants.

faqs.question: How much is the MBA fee at Reva University?
faqs.answer: Reva University's total MBA fee is around INR 9.0 lacs for the full 2-year course. One year fee is around INR 4.5 lac. There are additional hostel charges that you have to pay if you take accommodation.

faqs.question: Does REVA University have any refund policy?
faqs.answer: Yes, Reva University has a refund policy. It follows the UGC guidelines for the cancellation and refund. In a  few cases, there are no refunds. If the admission is cancelled due to disciplinary action or violation of Anti Ragging Regulations or breach of the code of conduct or any rule and regulation of the university, no refund is permissible. Also, entrance exam fees/application fees are non-refundable.

placement_report.college_name: REVA University Bengaluru Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: REVA University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: REVA University has released the placement stats for the batch passing out in 2025. More than 621 companies participated in the placement process and presented 4,816 job offers to the students with good packages. The highest package secured by the batch 2025 stood at INR 45.5 LPA . The students also secured 5 international offers, 178 super dream and 1,449 dream offers from the recruiters. IT and Software emerged as the top recruiting sector with offer distribution of 25%. The top recruiters of REVA University Bangalore in recent years include Bosch, Kyndryl, Happiest Minds, DXC Technology, Cognizant, etc.
A total of 2,329 internship offers were provided to the students during the placememt session 2025. The highest stipend offered was INR 1 lakh per month .
Earlier, the highest package secured by the students of the School of Business batch 2024 was INR 12 LPA . This package was offered by Deltax.

description: REVA University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

REVA University Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 4259 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 3875 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at REVA University. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 4259 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 1853, while in 2023, it was 2480.

hostel_campus.college_name: REVA University Bengaluru Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Hostels: There are separate 1400+ girls' hostel and 1600+ boys' hostel, with attached bathrooms, Hot water,  reading room with newspapers & magazines, 24 hours water / Electricity, Ramps and Lifts for physically challenged students, and Standby Generator, etc. The university also has a guest house for parents and visitors.

Library: The central Library covers an area of 35,680 sq. ft. of fully air-conditioned, well-laid-out, and aesthetically designed space. The students can study both by themselves and in groups from 8:00 am to 12:00 midnight.

Classrooms: The University has smart classrooms with enhanced technology, like e-portfolios, podcasts, streaming media and online discussion groups and quizzes. REVA also uses a Learning Management System (LMS) for efficient learning.

Sports Facility: The students have access to REVA Fitness Centre, which is spread around 10,000 sq. ft and houses advanced equipment that’s suitable even for professional training. There is also ‘The Game Box’, which has games like table tennis, foosball, chess, carrom, etc. There are also outdoor sports areas for basketball, cricket, football, hockey, Athletic Track, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities. Faculty members are quite helpful.
reviews.review_text: The library is open till midnight for studies. The hostel experience is above average. Medical facilities are provided on campus. It also has indoor and outdoor sports. The mess food can be eaten, and weekly they serve non-veg food thrice, which is generally nice. Labs are quite helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements, good student life.
reviews.review_text: Very good quality food is available in the food court, good medical facilities with emergency services. A large sports ground with lots of games, Wi-Fi is pretty fast for normal work with a wireless network around 100 Mbps and wired labs around 1 Gbps, a massive library with all relevant materials which are also uploaded online and can be accessed through their website, and smart classrooms with smartboards, TV, projector, and a green board.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, decent staff, and good placement.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are well maintained and have Wi-Fi. Food is decent. Medical facilities are available inside the campus, but there is no CCTV in classrooms. Labs are well-equipped, and all types of instruments are available. Classrooms are very well-equipped with smart boards.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good. The food court is also nice. We get all types of food items there. Even in our block, we have nice canteens where we can get snacks. Our college has many stalls like Maggi Point, Panchami Sagar, Nandini Cafe, and others.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and a huge campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college has speed Wi-Fi, good food. There are mess, canteens and quality food is served. There is also a medical room for treatment of fever for temporary use, there is a huge ground where people play around and its kind of a park. There are different games played like athletics, basketball, kabaddi and some other sports.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, academic life is good, bit messed up college life, could've been better in some places.
reviews.review_text: You get free Wi-Fi facility, classrooms are good, and libraries are excellent. The campus has a great vibe, especially during the rainy season 10/10, not gonna lie, it's so good. The food court is clean and provides very good food at affordable rates. You also have chances to prove yourself in sports, but make sure to take those opportunities.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is great infrastructure in Reva University, there is a 24/7 Wi-Fi facility, labs, and classrooms are great, and the library is so big, and all books are available. For hostelers, it is available up to midnight, and hostel and mess food is also hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure and a good crowd.
reviews.review_text: There are enough facilities in our hostel, including Wi-Fi, 24/7 hot water, and AC. The hostel food is good, with three meals and evening snacks. Each department has a separate library. There is also a central library with Wi-Fi. It is one of the best campuses in Bangalore. Along with facilities like a salon, novelty store, stationery and healthcare centre, food court, indoor sports arena, and fitness centre.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college for the MBA course.
reviews.review_text: The campus is stunning and has everything we could possibly need. In addition to having large classrooms, labs, Wi-Fi, and libraries. The hostel is, to be honest, subpar and more costly than the college tuition. It has mediocre amenities, and the cuisine is undoubtedly a concern.

reviews.review_heading: Good college that provides various opportunities.
reviews.review_text: We get clean and neat washrooms, water facilities, and hygienic food. Food in hostels is repetitive as they have fixed a timetable for each day. Sports and games are optional and depend on personal preference. Hostel maintenance is very good and acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, and we can expect our future here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like computer labs, Wi-Fi & Internet, library, resource center, seminar halls & auditorium, well-maintained indoor and outdoor door games, on-campus medical centre, trained medical staff, nutritionists, hygienic food, and spacious and well-maintained rooms are available.

reviews.review_heading: College looks nice and beautiful campus, but placements are average for the fee we pay.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the infrastructure, the college looks really neat and colourful thanks to the maintenance department from the college workers over there, and the hostel is also really good, but the fee is slightly high, and there are restrictions in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: REVA has good infrastructure , qualified teachers ,good placements ,Hostel rooms were big
reviews.review_text:
REVA has best infrastructure .Classrooms are really good even have smart classes . Washrooms are super clean and hygenic . Campus has a very good environment as well. Campus grounds are so well maintained.college library has books from almost all fields, interesting novels as well.
Mess has different food for breakfast lunch and dinner as per their schedule.
Canteens are have quality food at best price
Medical facilities are good

reviews.review_heading: Really good placements in 2025.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is not good, its always getting disconnected, and we need to connect again and again. It becomes somewhat difficult for us, so I prove that we can do it. The library is good, the environment is also good, we have so many trees on campus, which makes us feel good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good. If students are interested, then they can join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice, and I like it. The hostel fee and the college fee are a little expensive. If we put extra effort, then we will achieve success in our lives. There is a little issue with the lab faculty members, as they are not very good.

faqs.answer: Raja Rajeswari Medical College and Hospital (RMCH) in Bangalore offers the Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) program.The college also provides internships with the help of two hospital buildings attached to the college and one PHC center in the village area. The average placement package for MBBS graduates is around 6 LPA, and there are ample job opportunities outside the campus, with an average salary of 50-60 thousand per month. The college also prepares students for the National Exit Test (NExT), a combined single-window exam for MBBS students to qualify for admission into postgraduate courses as well as to obtain the license to practice medicine in India. For the MBBS program at RMCH, the NEET cut-off for the General category candidates in the All India quota was 412709 in 2022. The college has 250 seats for the MBBS program. To be admitted to the MBBS course at RMCH, candidates must qualify for the NEET UG entrance exam conducted by NTA. The course duration for MBBS at RMCH is 4.6 years, plus a 1-year internship.
faqs.question: Q: Why MBBS is considered as the top course at RMCH?

faqs.answer: Rohilkhand Medical College and Hospital (RMCH) in Bareilly, India, has a good MBBS program. The college has a well-equipped hospital with a 1160-bed facility that provides medical students with complete assistance and training in the medical industry. The college provides good internships, and many patients visit the hospital, so it's a good way for the budding doctors and the hospital consultancy. The average placement package is around 6 LPA for MBBS, and placements for MBBS or any other medical course are never a problem as there are ample job opportunities outside the campus.
faqs.question: Q: Is RMCH good for MBBS?

faqs.answer: If you want to enrol here, do so because it is a reputable college in Bangalore. This college is ranked seventh in Bangalore. The campus is 25 acres wide and has modern classrooms, a 45000 square foot computerised library, specialist labs, a 4000 seat auditorium, sports, cafeteria and gym facilities, a cricket pitch and more. The campus is large and well-maintained. There are numerous sporting facilities as well as free Wi-Fi. Although, college life is fun, you must carefully strike a balance because it can occasionally become difficult.

overview_faqs.question: Is RMCH good for MBBS?
overview_faqs.answer: Rohilkhand Medical College and Hospital (RMCH) in Bareilly, India, has a good MBBS program. The college has a well-equipped hospital with a 1160-bed facility that provides medical students with complete assistance and training in the medical industry. The college provides good internships, and many patients visit the hospital, so it's a good way for the budding doctors and the hospital consultancy. The average placement package is around 6 LPA for MBBS, and placements for MBBS or any other medical course are never a problem as there are ample job opportunities outside the campus.

overview_faqs.question: How is life at RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital?
overview_faqs.answer: If you want to enrol here, do so because it is a reputable college in Bangalore. This college is ranked seventh in Bangalore. The campus is 25 acres wide and has modern classrooms, a 45000 square foot computerised library, specialist labs, a 4000 seat auditorium, sports, cafeteria and gym facilities, a cricket pitch and more. The campus is large and well-maintained. There are numerous sporting facilities as well as free Wi-Fi. Although, college life is fun, you must carefully strike a balance because it can occasionally become difficult.

overview_faqs.question: How much does B.Sc at RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital cost?
overview_faqs.answer: The cost of a B.Sc. programme at RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital is ?72,000 pe year.Bsc in nursing is the main course joined by the students. It requires only 35 percent in graduation and there are 20 seats offered in each Bsc specialisation.

individual_reviews.course: MS in Ophthalmology - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a prominent medical campus.

content.Placements: Multispeciality hospitals and some of thespecialized eye clinics came for recruitment. The salary package ranged between 5 LPA to 15.5 LPA. A few of my friends started their own eye hospitals in their native areas.
content.Infrastructure: Firstly, students should stay in the hostel even though they are very near to the college. Because most of the time, we were required to visit some other hospitals for experienced practical training. To avoid delays, all of us requested to stay in hostels. The food provided in the hostel was acceptable to eat, but it was not nutritious.

There is a lot of variety of tasty food.

admission_process.title: RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital offers UG, PG and doctorate-level courses in Medical Sciences. Some of the medical courses offered at RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospitaland Hospital are MBBS, MD and PhD. Admission 2025 to the courses offered at RRMCH is entrance-based.

Courses in design are available at the RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital in a variety of specialisations, including Remedial Biology, Remedial Mathematics and Remedial Biology-Practical. Aspiring applicants must complete the selection criteria and fulfil the eligibility requirements for each course to be admitted to one of Moople's courses. The table below provides details regarding the eligibility and selection criteria for a range of popular undergraduate courses:

RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital course admissions 2025are entrance-based. Candidates can apply for their preferred course after checking the eligibility criteria. Below are the steps to get a seat in RajaRajeswari Medical College:
STEP 1: RajaRajeswari Medical College and HospitalApplicationProcess 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates can register online or download the application form for offline submission. Aspirants will need to fill out the details and upload their marksheet to complete the application process.

Candidates are selected based on the entrance exam of the course they want to be enrolled in. RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospitalaccepts results of various entrance exams such asNEET,NEET PG.The institute may conduct an entrance exam to shortlist aspirants.

Selected candidates are then required to secure their admission within the prescribed date and time at the institute campus by depositing relevant fee via debit card, credit card, internet banking, UPI or DD.

description: RMCH cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

RMCH NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 541606 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
RMCH MBBS cutoff 2025 was 541606 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

RMCH accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

RMCH NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 52841 to 191100. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the RMCH MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Radiodiagnosis, followed by MD in Pharmacology and MD in Microbiology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 52841, 188334 and 191100, respectively.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

RMCH NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to M.Ch., DM courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.

While for the last round, the closing ranks ranged from 2291 to 5377, wherein M.Ch. in Urology proved to be the most sought-after in the General AI category. Students can check the first and last round closing ranks from the table provided below.

In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 2291 for M.Ch. in Urology. In 2023, the same specialisation cutoff was capped at 6290.
For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.

Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated NEET SS cutoff PDFs for RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital. This will help students to understand the year-wise cutoff trends.

reviews.review_heading: I did a postgraduate course in Orthopedics.

review_content.Placements: Only 15% of students are placed in my college. The highest package is 8.4 LPA, the lowest is 2.4 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Mahindra and Tata Motors. Only 20% of students got internships. The top roles include mechanical engineering designer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-maintained. The labs have equipment, but most of it is not working. The Wi-Fi is not too bad. The library has good enough books. review_summary.college_name: Sandip University Nashik Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Many reputed companies came here. More than 80 percent of students were placed last year from my course. The highest package was not disclosed yet, and recruiting companies like IBM, Infosys, Accenture, etc., came here for recruitment and got a good placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very awesome at Sandip University. It is located in Nashik, and the climate is very good. It always rains there. The hostel is good; there are 4-sharing rooms, and 2-sharing rooms are also available. There are also 4 messes. Veg and non-veg options are available here.

individual_reviews.course: BBA LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty, balanced law and management course, good facilities, and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: The BBA LLB (Hons) course at Sandip University offers decent placement opportunities. Around 65-75% of students get placed each year. The highest package ranges from 7 LPA to 8 LPA, the lowest is around 3 LPA, and the average stands at 4.5 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiters include corporate firms like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, as well as law firms and consulting companies like Deloitte and KPMG. Nearly 80-90% of students secure internships in courts, law firms, NGOs, and corporate houses. Common roles offered are legal associate, corporate legal executive, compliance analyst, HR or business analyst, and litigation intern, ensuring a diverse career path.

content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-maintained. The labs have equipment, but most of it is not working. The Wi-Fi is not too bad. The library has good enough books. The hostel facilities are basic, with basic furniture. The food is always available but does not taste too good. There are a lot of canteens available.

individual_reviews.title: Sandip University- Gate way of dream life.

admission_overview.title: Sandip University, Nashik Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Sandip University Nashik admissions are mostly entrance-based. The university offers various courses at the UG, PG and Diploma levels. The courses are offered in full-time as well as part-time mode through the different schools of Sandip University. Admission to Sandip University courses is entrance-based. For admission to Sandip University MBA needs to appear for CAT/ XAT/ MAT or any state CET or Sandip University Joint Entrance test (SU JEE- MBA). Sandip University BTech admissions are done through SUJ-JEE/ MH-CET/ JEE Mains. Read the following article to know about the admissions process of Sandip University, Nashik.

eligibility_selection.title: Sandip University, Nashik Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Sandip University course admission is subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Students seeking admission to Sandip University courses must check the eligibility criteria before applying. For UG admissions, Class 12 is required and graduation is needed for PG admissions. The table below has eligibility and selection for Sandip University Courses:

paragraphs: Sandip University admission process starts with online application form filling followed by qualifying for the selection rounds. The application process can be completed online. Interested students can check below the steps ofSandip University admission process:
Candidates are required to fill out the application form online on the official website of the college. To be eligible to apply, candidates are required to fill out the criteria set by the college.

Sandip University selects candidates for some UG and PG courses based on some entrance exams accepted by the college. The college accepts CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ SU JEE/ JEE Mains/ MH CET/GATE/ SUN- GATE and others for admission to MBA, BTech and MTech, respectively. Additionally, for other courses, the college offers merit-based admission.
The candidates selected for the course must complete their enrollment by submitting the required fee within the given deadline to secure their seats.

faqs.question: When do admissions begin at Sandip University, Nashik?
faqs.answer: The Admission At Sandip University begin after 31 May each year. The Admission procedure is as follows:Enter your full Name as mentioned on the SSC result along with your registered mobile number.In the next section include the appropriate Personal details.In the “Program details” section ensure that you include proper options for the highest Qualification, Select School, Course Stream and Admission Year.Fill all the required “Education Details” as per your Qualification.Upload all the required scanned documents such as SSC, HSC & Graduation result. The Documents are accepted in PDF Format only.Proceed for your online payment to complete the payment.After successful payment, you will receive the confirmation of provisional registration details on your registered email and phone no.

placement_data.title: Sandip University Nashik Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Sandid University provides placement support to students across all disciplines including Management, Engineering, Pharmacy, Law and more. The University starts the placement training process from the first academic year itself. Students enroll in value added programs and take certifications in areas such as Aptitude, Communication and programming Languages. Sandip University Nashik conducts specialised training such as mock interviews, industry-specific sessions and group discussions.
According to the latest available data, the overall highest and average package recorded during Sandip University Nashik placements 2025 was INR 112 LPA and 12 LPA .

tables.context: How are the placements at Sandip University Nashik

faqs.question: How are the placements at Sandip University Nashik?
faqs.answer: The key highlights of Sandip University Nashik placements 2025 are mentioned below: Particulars Placement Statistics 2025 the highest international package INR 112 LPA the highest domestic package INR 28 LPA Average package INR 12 LPA Placement assistance 100% Companies visited 250

faqs.question: How many companies visit the campus during Sandip University placements?
faqs.answer: More than 250 companies visited the campus during Sandip University Nashik placements 2025.

faqs.question: Does Sandip University Nashik offer international placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sandip University Nashik offers international placements. The highest international package offered in 2025 was INR 112 LPA. The University also offers internship in countries such as Russia, Dubai and Germany.

faqs.question: What career prospects can I expect after completing B.Sc from Sandip University?
faqs.answer: Completing the Sandip University BSc course can lead to various career prospects in different domains and industries. Students with good academics can get into research. Students with a hold on practical aspects can look for jobs such as Data Engineer, Lab Technician, Data Aanalyst, and more. In general, fresh BSc graduates can expect to start with a salary ranging from INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA. Moreover, students must note that prospective career choices and expected salary also depend on students' skill sets and competencies.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sandip University Nashik Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very awesome at Sandip University. It is located in Nashik, and the climate is very good. It always rains there. The hostel is good; there are 4-sharing rooms, and 2-sharing rooms are also available. There are also 4 messes. Veg and non-veg options are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, balanced law and management course, good facilities, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Sandip University offers Wi-Fi classrooms, a moot court hall, and a well-stocked library with legal databases. Hostels are Wi-Fi-enabled with decent mess food. The campus has 24x7 medical aid, a canteen, sports facilities, and a gym, ensuring a student-friendly environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college is moderately good, with average-quality education.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well-maintained. The labs have equipment, but most of it is not working. The Wi-Fi is not too bad. The library has good enough books. The hostel facilities are basic, with basic furniture. The food is always available but does not taste too good. There are a lot of canteens available.

reviews.review_heading: All the above is true, and you can take admission if you want to.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available for our course department is very good. The infrastructure is very well-maintained. There are labs, libraries, and ground. Quality of food and other facilities is available. Overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Sandip University- Gate way of dream life.
reviews.review_text: It has state-of-the-art infrastructure. Huge campus of 274 acres which can accommodate large crowds. Overall there are too many facilities on campus. Sports complex which has football ground, cricket ground, and badminton court with basketball and tennis court. It also has multiple canteens and food courts.

reviews.review_heading: Better for middle-class families and others as well.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our department include Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of facilities in our hostel is average. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also average.  Ambulance is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: College is budget-friendly, and also satisfied with faculty and infrastructure of college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are excellent. Classrooms consist of good board view space, Wi-Fi, and all digital-based classrooms. Presence of a central library full of course books and non-course books. A digital library is also included in the central library. Labs are very comfortable and have good machines and materials to perform experiments. Coming to the food, there are two menu systems - North and South. Food quality is very fine. Hostel facilities are good. Every room has a Wi-Fi fa...

reviews.review_heading: Sandip University gateway to a dream life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the finest in the city it has 275 acres campus which feels unreal. Several Canteens and garden multiple libraries a huge sports complex consisting of football ground, cricket ground, basketball court, tennis court and kabbadi ground. Along with it multiple labs.

reviews.review_heading: Good for studying.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for every registered student, and labs, classrooms, and the library are available in the college. The hostel in my college is good, but we have to adjust to the food. We can play on the grounds of the college, and medical facilities are available at all times.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sandip University, Nashik.
reviews.review_text: Our college mess and canteen are good. Sports and games are organized in our college. Medical facilities and other things are provided by the college. Our college library is so valuable and big for students. They also provide us with many things.

reviews.review_heading: It has the best climate. It is the best college in the city.
reviews.review_text: The department offers well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a rich library. Hostels are decent with clean rooms. Mess and canteen food is average. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports and games facilities are good and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: From my side, this college is good, because the teaching staff is so good.
reviews.review_text: Some facilities are good, and some are bad like Wi-Fi, classrooms, canteen, and food are not very good. Medical facilities are good. There are no sports here. There is a sports ground but they cannot teach sports. They force us to play.

reviews.review_heading: Sandip University, Nashik.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Sandip University is top-notch. Classrooms have projectors and TV screens for a better understanding of concepts. The quality of facilities in my hostel is above average. The food in the mess is good. Medical facilities are present on campus.  Also, having two grounds on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Sandip University is worth it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is above average. In some classrooms, Wi-Fi, digital TVs, and AC are available, but in others, these facilities are not available. The maintenance of hostels is also above average. The food in the canteen is of poor quality, and many students are getting sick due to acidity. There is one ambulance in the college, so the medical facilities are good. There are separate grounds for cricket, football, and volleyball. It has very good facilities for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Students of Sandip University.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good to see, and Wi-Fi is available in labs in our college. There are two central libraries for this course. There is good food, chicken is nice to eat, and some other food, like vada pav, is so nice.

The total fees for Sandip University BPharma course is a combination of various fee components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, one-time fees, etc. As per the structure, the total tuition fees to pursue the BPharma programme is INR 1.25 lakh. Other than this, students who opt for hostel facilitties must pay the hostel fees of INR 1.1 lakh per annum. Students are also required to pay the one-time hostel deposit of INR 5,000. Tabulated below are more fee components that are to be paid by the students:
Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official website of the university. However, it is subject to change.

The Master of Business Administration programme at Sandip University, Nashik is not very expensive compared to other universities in India. The fee structure for the Master of Business Administration programme at Sandip University, Nashik varies depending on the specialuzations, but the range of INR 75 K to INR 4.9 Lacs (for 2 years-30 months).
